descriptionHtml:
About Revolut

People deserve more from their money. More visibility, more control, and more freedom. Since 2015, Revolut has been on a mission to deliver just that. Our powerhouse of products — including spending, saving, investing, exchanging, travelling, and more — help our 70+ million customers get more from their money every day.

As we continue our lightning-fast growth,‌ 2 things are essential to our success: our people and our culture. In recognition of our outstanding employee experience, we've been certified as a Great Place to Work™. So far, we have 13,000+ people working around the world, from our offices and remotely, to help us achieve our mission. And we're looking for more brilliant people. People who love building great products, redefining success, and turning the complexity of a chaotic world into the simplicity of a beautiful solution.

About The Role

At Revolut, Operations means problem-solving at scale. Our team tackles the company’s toughest challenges with speed, precision, and creativity. They design systems that unlock efficiency and power global growth.

We’re looking for a Production Operations Manager to manage teams of up to 100 agents. You'll be collaborating closely with product teams, leveraging your people and project management experience, to continuously focus on optimising processes.

Up to shape what's next in finance? Let's get in touch.

What You’ll Be Doing

  • Managing a team of direct and indirect reports
  • Exploring and defining which projects the team should prioritise, and setting a timeline to reach goals quickly
  • Taking responsibility for your team's development, guiding and working with them to unlock their full potential
  • Leading by example, resolving the toughest customer issues, and ensuring consistent high-level performance from the team
  • Interacting and collaborating with teams across the globe to constantly improve service levels
  • Making critical business decisions by breaking down complex business cases and backing up reasoning using advanced analysis
  • Proposing, developing, and implementing systems, programmes, and processes to strengthen the foundation of exceptional customer service
  • Building and optimising scalable processes to promote hyper-growth
  • Owning business line metrics and improving people's performance, including decision-making quality and efficiency
  • Establishing lasting relationships with vendors and partners to influence decisions for great deal-making

What You'll Need

  • At least a 2:1 degree from a top university
  • Experience in engineering (graduates welcome to apply)
  • Experience working in a structured, KPI-focused environment, such as a startup
  • Experience managing large teams composed of direct and indirect reports
  • Leadership skills with a creative, confident, and motivational approach
  • Excellent communication, interpersonal, and people management skills
  • The ability to work in a fast-paced environment, managing multiple challenges simultaneously
  • An excellent problem-solving approach and demonstrated record of executing projects that measurably improved different metrics
  • To be logical, analytical, and have experience resolving team productivity or quality issues in efficient ways
  • The ability to identify operational inefficiencies and provide practical solutions
  • The ability to take a data-driven approach to identify root causes, measure performance, and drive process improvements

Nice to have

  • Experience working with SQL, Python, and/or R
  • Certifications in Lean Six Sigma

Building a global financial super app isn’t enough. Our Revoluters are a priority, and that’s why in 2021 we launched our inaugural D&I Framework, designed to help us thrive and grow everyday. We're not just doing this because it's the right thing to do. We’re doing it because we know that seeking out diverse talent and creating an inclusive workplace is the way to create exceptional, innovative products and services for our customers. That’s why we encourage applications from people with diverse backgrounds and experiences to join this multicultural, hard-working team.

Important notice for candidates:

Job scams are on the rise. Please keep these guidelines in mind when applying for any open roles.

  • Only apply through official Revolut channels. We don’t use any third-party services or platforms for our recruitment.
  • Always double-check the emails you receive. Make sure all communications are being done through official Revolut emails, with an @revolut.com domain.

We won't ask for payment or personal financial information during the hiring process. If anyone does ask you for this, it’s a scam. Report it immediately.

By submitting this application, I confirm that all the information given by me in this application for employment and any additional documents attached hereto are true to the best of my knowledge and that I have not wilfully suppressed any material fact. I confirm I have disclosed if applicable any previous employment with Revolut. I accept that if any of the information given by me in this application is in any way false or incorrect, my application may be rejected, any offer of employment may be withdrawn or my employment with Revolut may be terminated summarily or I may be dismissed. By submitting this application, I agree that my personal data will be processed in accordance with Revolut's Candidate Privacy Notice

title: Senior Director of Product Management
sector: Internet Marketplace Platforms, Technology, Information and Media, and Information Services

descriptionHtml:
Role Overview

We are seeking a Senior Director of Marketing OS & Lead Generation Suite to own and scale one of the most critical product pillars. This leader will define the vision, strategy, and execution across our end-to-end lead generation and marketing operating system, ensuring our customers can attract, capture, nurture, and convert leads seamlessly.This role sits at the intersection of product, growth, and platform strategy, and will oversee a broad and highly integrated portfolio of tools that power the full customer acquisition lifecycle.


Product Scope

You will lead strategy and execution across a comprehensive suite of products, including:

  • Lead Capture & Conversion: Funnels & Websites, Funnel AI, Forms, Surveys, Quizzes, QR Codes, Chat Widget, Countdown Timers, Funnel Widgets
  • Traffic & Acquisition: Digital Ads, SEO, AEO, GEO, Online Listings, Google Business Profile (GBP), Domains, URL Redirects
  • Engagement & Nurture: Email Marketing, Email AI, Social Planner, Blogs, Reputation Management, Notifications
  • Growth & Monetization: Affiliate Manager, Loyalty & Referral Programs
  • Brand & Content Systems: Template Library, Brand Boards, Media Storage, Webinar
  • Data, Analytics & Tracking: Dashboards, Reporting, Analytics, External Tracking
  • Emerging Experiences: Vibe and next-gen AI-driven marketing workflows


Key Responsibilities

1. Vision & Strategy

  • Define and own the long-term vision for organization’s Marketing OS and Lead Generation ecosystem
  • Identify opportunities to unify fragmented tools into a cohesive, AI-powered growth platform
  • Drive product strategy that increases lead volume, conversion rates, and customer ROI

2. Product Leadership

  • Lead a group of product managers and cross-functional teams across multiple product lines
  • Ensure tight integration across all surfaces to deliver a seamless user experience
  • Prioritize investments across a large surface area with clear ROI and customer impact

3. Growth & Monetization

  • Partner with Growth, Sales, and Customer Success to drive:
  • Adoption of core lead gen tools
  • Expansion revenue across the suite
  • Measurable improvements in customer acquisition performance
  • Develop packaging and positioning strategies for bundled and standalone offerings

4. AI & Automation Innovation

  • Embed AI across the ecosystem (Email AI, Funnels AI, Vibe, etc.) to create autonomous marketing workflows
  • Lead the transition from tools → intelligent systems that execute for the customer

5. Platform & Ecosystem Thinking

  • Ensure all products operate as part of a unified Marketing OS, not standalone features
  • Drive extensibility through APIs, integrations, and ecosystem partnerships
  • Collaborate with other platform leaders (CRM, Payments, Conversations, etc.)

6. Data & Performance Ownership

  • Establish and track core metrics:
  • Lead generation volume & quality
  • Conversion rates across funnels
  • Campaign performance (ads, email, SEO)
  • Customer ROI and LTV impact
  • Build feedback loops using analytics and reporting to continuously optimize performance

7. Cross-Functional Leadership

  • Work closely with Engineering, Design, Marketing, Sales, and Support
  • Align stakeholders around roadmap priorities and platform direction
  • Act as a key executive voice for this product pillar internally and externally


Qualifications

  • 10+ years of experience in product management, growth, or marketing technology
  • Proven track record leading large, complex product portfolios or platforms
  • Deep expertise in lead generation, digital marketing, and conversion systems
  • Experience with tools such as:
  • Funnels / landing pages
  • Paid ads platforms
  • Email marketing & automation
  • SEO / local SEO
  • Strong understanding of SMB and agency needs (preferred)
  • Experience integrating or building AI-driven product experiences
  • Demonstrated ability to lead senior ICs and managers across multiple teams
  • Highly data-driven with strong business and monetization acumen


Why This Role Matters

This is one of the most strategic leadership roles at client. You will directly shape how millions of businesses acquire and grow customers, while defining the future of AI-powered marketing platforms.

descriptionHtml:
At eBay, we're more than a global ecommerce leader — we’re changing the way the world shops and sells. Our platform empowers millions of buyers and sellers in more than 190 markets around the world. We’re committed to pushing boundaries and leaving our mark as we reinvent the future of ecommerce for enthusiasts.

Our customers are our compass, authenticity thrives, bold ideas are welcome, and everyone can bring their unique selves to work — every day. We're in this together, sustaining the future of our customers, our company, and our planet.

Join a team of passionate thinkers, innovators, and dreamers — and help us connect people and build communities to create economic opportunity for all.

Director – Product Management, Product Knowledge

Build the Data-Powered, AI-Driven Future of Product Discovery

About The Role

We’re on a mission to redefine how people discover, explore, and connect with products online—and we need a visionary product leader to take us there.

As Director of Product Management, you’ll lead the strategy and execution for our Product Knowledge and Catalog Platform—the intelligence layer that powers everything from search and recommendations to personalization and generative AI. You’ll shape how structured data, AI/ML, and LLMs come together to build scalable, magical, and deeply relevant customer experiences at massive scale.

You’ll work at the heart of a high-performing, cross-functional team—collaborating with AI researchers, data scientists, and engineers to build the foundational data products that power discovery for millions of users.

This is a rare opportunity to lead in a high-agency, startup-style environment with the resources and reach of a global platform.

What You’ll Own

  • Catalog Intelligence at Scale Lead the development of robust, intelligent, and flexible catalog systems. Create automated, scalable ways to structure, enrich, and normalize product data across categories and geographies.
  • Vision for Product Knowledge Define and own the product vision for taxonomy, ontology, metadata, and knowledge graphs that power our search and AI platforms.
  • Build Magical Data Products Launch internal tools and APIs that feel like magic—powerful, intuitive, and built with scale and automation in mind. Make structured data work harder and smarter across all surfaces.
  • Power Discovery Through AI & LLMs Partner with AI and data science teams to use LLMs, embeddings, and prompt engineering for entity resolution, classification, and content enrichment—fueling delightful discovery.
  • Design for Relevance & Impact Focus relentlessly on customer experience—ensuring your products make search more relevant, recommendations smarter, and exploration more intuitive.
  • Drive Product Excellence Define metrics, establish feedback loops, and iterate quickly. Marry technical depth with customer empathy to shape products that solve real problems beautifully.
  • Collaborate to Deliver Partner across Product, Engineering, AI/ML, Trust, and Catalog Ops to launch products that are both deeply technical and profoundly user-centered.


What We’re Looking For

  • 12+ years of product management experience, with 5+ years leading teams in platform, data, or AI-driven environments
  • Proven track record building structured data platforms, knowledge systems, or eCommerce catalog infrastructure
  • Strong understanding of taxonomy, metadata strategy, and product classification
  • Experience working with AI/ML teams, including familiarity with LLMs and semantic search (a plus)
  • A bias for scalable solutions—you know how to build for today and architect for tomorrow
  • Obsession with relevance, automation, and magic—you craft products that delight both internal and external users
  • Strong communicator with a track record of cross-functional leadership and influence
  • Comfort working in fast-paced, iterative environments—you thrive in ambiguity and move with urgency


Why You’ll Love This Role

  • Build the backbone of product discovery for one of the world’s largest eCommerce platforms
  • Lead a portfolio that touches AI, structured data, and real-time customer experience
  • Create scalable systems that drive magical user experiences at global scale
  • Work with world-class teams in AI/ML, data science, and engineering
  • Enjoy high ownership, fast execution, and a culture that values bold ideas and real impact


Please see the Talent Privacy Notice for information regarding how eBay handles your personal data collected when you use the eBay Careers website or apply for a job with eBay.

eBay is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, veteran status, and disability, or other legally protected status. If you have a need that requires accommodation, please contact us at talent@ebay.com. We will make every effort to respond to your request for accommodation as soon as possible. View our accessibility statement to learn more about eBay's commitment to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities.

The eBay Jobs website uses cookies to enhance your experience. By continuing to browse the site, you agree to our use of cookies. Visit our Privacy Center for more information.

descriptionHtml:
About Revolut

People deserve more from their money. More visibility, more control, and more freedom. Since 2015, Revolut has been on a mission to deliver just that. Our powerhouse of products — including spending, saving, investing, exchanging, travelling, and more — help our 70+ million customers get more from their money every day.

As we continue our lightning-fast growth,‌ 2 things are essential to our success: our people and our culture. In recognition of our outstanding employee experience, we've been certified as a Great Place to Work™. So far, we have 13,000+ people working around the world, from our offices and remotely, to help us achieve our mission. And we're looking for more brilliant people. People who love building great products, redefining success, and turning the complexity of a chaotic world into the simplicity of a beautiful solution.

About The Role

The Product team shapes the experiences that power Revolut. They turn complex problems into simple, scalable solutions — collaborating across Design, Engineering, and Data to build features our customers love.

We're looking for a Head of Product to rethink our products and fraud systems to be AI-centric. You'll leverage AI for automation and enable intuitive, multi-modal customer interactions to build trust and streamline compliance processes.

Up to shape what's next in finance? Let's get in touch.

What You’ll Be Doing

  • Leading a financial crime product team, designing features that improve security across Revolut’s global platform
  • Building teams to align with product objectives and developing team members to enable their career growth
  • Overseeing your team's product roadmap, from strategic planning and conception, to execution and launch.

What You'll Need

  • 7+ years of product management experience
  • 3+ years of experience managing large teams (product leaders at Revolut directly manage multiple squads and Product Owners)
  • Experience managing AI products, data science products, customer-facing products, and back office systems
  • Experience formulating and driving a focused product vision, and owning the narrative with leadership, customers, and partners
  • High analytical acumen along with solid business sense that guides ROI-based prioritisation
  • A bias towards action and bootstrapping major projects, never hesitating to roll up your sleeves and be hands-on
  • Experience leading product development and launch from scratch
  • The ability to provide insight and deliver measurable results for sophisticated products under ambiguous situations in a fast-paced environment

Building a global financial super app isn’t enough. Our Revoluters are a priority, and that’s why in 2021 we launched our inaugural D&I Framework, designed to help us thrive and grow everyday. We're not just doing this because it's the right thing to do. We’re doing it because we know that seeking out diverse talent and creating an inclusive workplace is the way to create exceptional, innovative products and services for our customers. That’s why we encourage applications from people with diverse backgrounds and experiences to join this multicultural, hard-working team.

Important notice for candidates:

Job scams are on the rise. Please keep these guidelines in mind when applying for any open roles.

  • Only apply through official Revolut channels. We don’t use any third-party services or platforms for our recruitment.
  • Always double-check the emails you receive. Make sure all communications are being done through official Revolut emails, with an @revolut.com domain.

We won't ask for payment or personal financial information during the hiring process. If anyone does ask you for this, it’s a scam. Report it immediately.

descriptionHtml:
PAYU PAYMENTS PRIVATE LIMITED

Director - Product Management

Location – Bangalore

About The Role

We are looking for a strategic and innovative Director of Product Management to lead our product initiatives at PayU Finance. In this pivotal role, you will drive the vision, strategy, and execution of our product portfolio, ensuring that our offerings meet market needs and adhere to regulatory standards. You will lead a talented team of product managers and collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver exceptional financial technology solutions that enhance customer experiences and drive business growth.

Responsibilities

  • Strategic Leadership: Develop and execute product strategies that align with business objectives, market demands, and customer feedback, ensuring a competitive edge in the fintech landscape.
  • Team Development: Lead, mentor, and inspire a high-performing team of product managers, fostering a culture of innovation, collaboration, and continuous improvement.
  • Market Research & Analysis: Conduct comprehensive market research and competitive analysis to identify trends, opportunities, and customer pain points. Use insights to inform product development and positioning.
  • Product Lifecycle Management: Oversee the entire product lifecycle from ideation to launch, ensuring timely delivery of high-quality products that meet user needs and regulatory requirements.
  • Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with engineering, design, marketing, compliance, and sales teams to ensure alignment on product goals and execution plans.
  • Data-Driven Decision Making: Utilize analytics and key performance indicators (KPIs) to measure product success post-launch. Make informed decisions to iterate on products based on user feedback and performance metrics.
  • Risk Management & Compliance: Ensure all products comply with legal standards and regulations. Collaborate with legal teams to mitigate risks associated with product development.

Requirements

  • Experience: 12+ years of experience in product management within the fintech industry(BNPL Must Have), with a proven track record of successfully launching products at scale.
  • Leadership Skills: Strong leadership experience with the ability to build, develop, and motivate a creative team while driving alignment across various functions.
  • Technical Proficiency: Deep understanding of financial technology products, regulatory environments, user experience design principles, and agile methodologies.
  • Analytical Mindset: Ability to analyze data effectively to drive product decisions and measure success.
  • Communication Skills: Excellent verbal and written communication skills to articulate product vision and strategy clearly across all levels of the organization.

What we offer?

  • A positive, get-things-done workplace
  • A dynamic, constantly evolving space (change is par for the course – important you are comfortable with this).
  • An inclusive environment that ensures we listen to a diverse range of voices when making decisions.
  • Ability to learn cutting edge concepts and innovation in an agile start-up environment with a global scale.
  • Access to 5000+ training courses accessible anytime/anywhere to support your growth and development (Corporate with top learning partners like Harvard, Coursera, Udacity).

About Us

At PayU, we are a global fintech investor and our vision is to build a world without financial borders where everyone can prosper. We give people in high growth markets the financial services and products they need to thrive. Our expertise in 18+ high-growth markets enables us to extend the reach of financial services. This drives everything we do, from investing in technology entrepreneurs to offering credit to underserved individuals, to helping merchants buy, sell, and operate online. Being part of Prosus, one of the largest technology investors in the world, gives us the presence and expertise to make a real impact. Find out more at www.payu.com

Our Commitment to Building A Diverse and Inclusive Workforce

As a global and multi-cultural organization with varied ethnicities thriving across locations, we realize that our responsibility towards fulfilling the D&I commitment is huge. Therefore, we continuously strive to create a diverse, inclusive, and safe environment, for all our people, communities, and customers. Our leaders are committed to create an inclusive work culture which enables transparency, flexibility, and unbiased attention to every PayUneer so they can succeed, irrespective of gender, color, or personal faith. An environment where every person feels they belong, that they are listened to, and where they are empowered to speak up. At PayU we have zero tolerance towards any form of prejudice whether a specific race, ethnicity, or of persons with disabilities, or the LGBTQ communities.

descriptionHtml:
Job Summary

NetApp is transforming how customers manage their data infrastructure through unified, AI-driven experiences. We're seeking an exceptional Senior Director of Product Management to lead our Bangalore-based manageability product team and drive the next generation of autonomous storage operations.

In this role, you'll lead product strategy and execution for NetApp's manageability platform, including AI-powered autonomous operations capabilities, hybrid multi-cloud control plane, and SaaS platform services. This is a high-impact leadership role partnering closely with engineering, design, and go-to-market teams globally to deliver experiences that eliminate operational complexity and delight customers

Job Requirements

Product Strategy & Execution

  • Define and drive product strategy for NetApp's manageability platform, including AI-powered autonomous operations, hybrid multi-cloud control plane, and SaaS infrastructure.
  • Lead a product management team in Bangalore, building strong talent and establishing best practices.
  • Manage the complete product lifecycle for AI/ML platform services, hybrid multi-cloud capabilities, SaaS/SRE infrastructure, and trial/demo environments.
  • Develop roadmaps that balance customer requirements, competitive dynamics, and business priorities.

Platform Development

  • Build platform capabilities that enable AI-powered agents to work seamlessly across NetApp's portfolio.
  • Deliver a hybrid multi-cloud control plane that manages NetApp infrastructure across on-premises, AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud environments.
  • Ensure platform services (IAM, security, observability) are scalable, reliable, and easy to integrate.

Customer & Market Engagement

  • Understand customer workflows, pain points, and requirements through research, advisory boards, and direct engagement.
  • Translate customer insights into differentiated product experiences.
  • Work with sales teams to enable customer conversations and represent NetApp's vision at industry events.

Team & Organization

  • Build and scale the product management organization in Bangalore.
  • Establish effective collaboration across distributed, global teams.
  • Partner with engineering leadership to maintain strong product-engineering alignment.
  • Set standards for product management practices and execution.

Required Qualifications

  • 15+ years of product management experience in enterprise software, SaaS, or infrastructure products.
  • 7+ years leading product management teams, including experience building and scaling teams.
  • Proven track record of shipping successful enterprise products that customers love.
  • Deep understanding of hybrid and multi-cloud architectures, SaaS platforms, and site reliability engineering principles.
  • Experience with AI/ML technologies and agentic/autonomous systems.
  • Strong technical acumen with ability to engage deeply with engineering teams on architecture and implementation.
  • Demonstrated ability to drive cross-functional alignment in complex, matrixed organizations.
  • Exceptional communication skills with ability to influence at all levels, including executive leadership.
  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field; MBA or advanced degree preferred.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience in storage, data management, or infrastructure management domains.
  • Background in building platform services or developer platforms.
  • Experience managing services across multiple cloud providers.
  • Experience with observability, monitoring, and AIOps technologies.
  • Track record of successful product launches in competitive markets.
  • Experience managing global, distributed product teams.
  • Understanding of enterprise sales processes and agile development methodologies.

At NetApp, we embrace a hybrid working environment designed to strengthen connection, collaboration, and culture for all employees. This means that most roles will have some level of in-office and/or in-person expectations, which will be shared during the recruitment process.

Equal Opportunity Employer

NetApp is firmly committed to Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and to compliance with all federal, state and local laws that prohibit employment discrimination based on age, race, color, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, religion, disability or genetic information, pregnancy, protected veteran status, and any other protected classification.

Why You'll Thrive at NetApp

At NetApp, you won't wait for the perfect moment—you'll make it. The early planning, the extra thought, the bold idea that turns good into great: That's how our people operate and how we continue to push the boundaries of data infrastructure.

NetApp is the trusted partner for organizations transforming data into opportunity. As the only enterprise-grade storage service natively embedded in Google Cloud, AWS, and Microsoft Azure, we empower customers to run everything from traditional workloads to enterprise AI with unmatched performance, resilience, and security.

Our culture

We celebrate mold breakers, bold thinkers, and problem solvers. We reward initiative, impact, and ownership. We provide flexibility so you can balance professional ambition with your personal life. Here, differences are not just welcomed—they drive everything we do.

If you're ready to innovate, rise to the challenge, and own every moment - make your next move your best one. Apply now.

title: Director of Product Management
description: Greenlight is the leading family fintech company on a mission to help parents raise financially smart kids. We proudly serve more than 6 million parents and kids with our award-winning banking app for families. With Greenlight, parents can automate allowance, manage chores, set flexible spend controls, and invest for their family’s future. Kids and teens learn to earn, save, spend wisely, and invest.At Greenlight, we believe every child should have the opportunity to become financially healthy and happy. It’s no small task, and that’s why we leap out of bed every morning to come to work. Because creating a better, brighter future for the next generation depends on it.We are seeking a Director of Product Management to lead our India-based product management team responsible for foundational platform capabilities that power our financial services ecosystem. This is a highly strategic and technical leadership role that sits at the center of our architecture, enabling scale, compliance, and innovation across multiple products serving the U.S. consumer market. You will own and evolve a portfolio of mission-critical platforms that are reused across multiple product lines and directly impact customer experience, regulatory adherence, moneitzation, and operational efficiency.This role requires a strong technical product leader with deep platform experience, excellent systems thinking, and demonstrated success leading high-performing teams. descriptionHtml:
Greenlight is the leading family fintech company on a mission to help parents raise financially smart kids. We proudly serve more than 6 million parents and kids with our award-winning banking app for families. With Greenlight, parents can automate allowance, manage chores, set flexible spend controls, and invest for their family’s future. Kids and teens learn to earn, save, spend wisely, and invest.


At Greenlight, we believe every child should have the opportunity to become financially healthy and happy. It’s no small task, and that’s why we leap out of bed every morning to come to work. Because creating a better, brighter future for the next generation depends on it.


We are seeking a Director of Product Management to lead our India-based product management team responsible for foundational platform capabilities that power our financial services ecosystem. This is a highly strategic and technical leadership role that sits at the center of our architecture, enabling scale, compliance, and innovation across multiple products serving the U.S. consumer market. You will own and evolve a portfolio of mission-critical platforms that are reused across multiple product lines and directly impact customer experience, regulatory adherence, moneitzation, and operational efficiency.


This role requires a strong technical product leader with deep platform experience, excellent systems thinking, and demonstrated success leading high-performing teams. In addition to directly managing a small team of product managers, you will also serve as the most senior product leader for the India site, helping elevate product craft, operating rigor, and cross-functional alignment.


What you will be doing:

  • Define and drive the long-term strategy and roadmap for core platform capabilities.
  • Ensure platform services are scalable, secure, compliant, extensible, and reusable across the organization.
  • Balance immediate product team needs with long-term architectural integrity.
  • Identify and drive opportunities to leverage AI both in product execution as well as within platform capabilities
  • Proven experience owning and scaling complex, distributed systems.
  • Experience in fintech, financial services, SaaS, or other regulated industries strongly preferred.
  • Demonstrated success building reusable platforms used by multiple internal teams.
  • Strong understanding of distributed systems, APIs, microservices, and event-driven architectures.
  • Directly lead, mentor, and grow a team of platform product managers responsible for core Greenlight platforms
  • Strong systems thinker with ability to see cross-domain dependencies.
  • Exceptional stakeholder management across geographies.
  • Experience operating in a US–India distributed team model.
  • Ability to balance long-term platform health with short-term business demands.
  • Act as a senior product leader for the India office, strengthening product operations, the product craft, and cross-functional collaboration with Engineering, Design, Data, Risk, Compliance, and Operations.
  • Hands on experience and a deep understanding of the strengths and trade-offs of leading AI tools with demonstrated ability to build, deploy, and iterate on AI projects.


What you should bring:

  • 10+ years of product management experience, with at least 5+ years in platform product management.
  • 3+ years of people management experience leading product managers.
  • Proven experience owning and scaling complex, distributed systems.
  • Experience in fintech, financial services, SaaS, or other regulated industries strongly preferred.
  • Demonstrated success building reusable platforms used by multiple internal teams.
  • Strong understanding of distributed systems, APIs, microservices, and event-driven architectures.
  • Experience with identity systems, billing/subscription systems, or compliance platforms preferred.
  • Ability to engage deeply with engineering on architecture decisions and trade-offs.
  • Comfort with data models, system integrations, and platform scalability challenges.
  • Hands on experience and a deep understanding of the strengths and trade-offs of leading AI tools with demonstrated ability to build, deploy, and iterate on AI projects.
  • Exceptional stakeholder management across geographies.
  • Experience operating in a US–India distributed team model.


Domain Ownership:

  • Identity & Access Management: authentication, authorization, RBAC/ABAC, SSO, multi-factor authentication, and fraud-resistant identity systems.
  • Accounts Platform: user lifecycle management, account hierarchy, permissions, data governance.
  • Pricing & Plans: flexible product configuration, entitlements, packaging, experimentation support.
  • Billing Platform: subscription management, invoicing, payments integration, financial reconciliation, reporting.
  • Notifications Platform: multi-channel delivery (email, SMS, push), templating, orchestration, and reliability.
  • Risk & Compliance Systems: policy engines, rule frameworks, AI/ML models, monitoring, auditability, regulatory compliance controls.


Why This Role Matters:

  • Platform is the backbone of our product ecosystem. This leader will directly influence:
  • How we scale new products and features
  • How we manage risk and regulatory compliance
  • How we monetize effectively
  • How we deliver secure, seamless customer experiences
  • This is a high-impact leadership opportunity to shape the foundational architecture of a growing financial technology organization while building and leading a world-class product team in India.


Education:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related technical field required.
  • MBA or advanced technical degree preferred but not required.


Who we are:

It takes a special team to aim for a never-been-done-before mission like ours. We’re looking for people who love working together because they know it makes us stronger, people who look to others and ask, “How can I help?” and then “How can we make this even better?” If you’re ready to roll up your sleeves and help create a world where every child grows up to be happy and healthy in money and life, apply to join our team.


Greenlight is an equal opportunity employer and will not discriminate against any employee or applicant based on age, race, color, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, religion, physical or mental disability, medical condition (including pregnancy, childbirth, or a medical condition related to pregnancy or childbirth), genetic information, marital status, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local law.


Greenlight is committed to an inclusive work environment and interview experience. If you require reasonable accommodations to participate in our hiring process, please reach out to your recruiter directly or accomodations@greenlight.me.

title: Production Manager
description: About RevolutPeople deserve more from their money. More visibility, more control, and more freedom. Since 2015, Revolut has been on a mission to deliver just that. Our powerhouse of products — including spending, saving, investing, exchanging, travelling, and more — help our 70+ million customers get more from their money every day.As we continue our lightning-fast growth,‌ 2 things are essential to our success: our people and our culture. In recognition of our outstanding employee experience, we've been certified as a Great Place to Work™. So far, we have 13,000+ people working around the world, from our offices and remotely, to help us achieve our mission. And we're looking for more brilliant people. People who love building great products, redefining success, and turning the complexity of a chaotic world into the simplicity of a beautiful solution.About The RoleAt Revolut, Operations means problem-solving at scale. Our team tackles the company’s toughest challenges with speed, precision, and creativity. They design systems that unlock efficiency and power global growth.We’re looking for a Production Operations Manager to manage teams of up to 100 agents. You'll be collaborating closely with product teams, leveraging your people and project management experience, to continuously focus on optimising processes.Up to shape what's next in finance? Let's get in touch.What You’ll Be DoingManaging a team of direct and indirect reports Exploring and defining which projects the team should prioritise, and setting a timeline to reach goals quicklyTaking responsibility for your team's development, guiding and working with them to unlock their full potentialLeading by example, resolving the toughest customer issues, and ensuring consistent high-level performance from the teamInteracting and collaborating with teams across the globe to constantly improve service levelsMaking critical business decisions by breaking down complex business cases and backing up reasoning using advanced analysisProposing, developing, and implementing systems, programmes, and processes to strengthen the foundation of exceptional customer serviceBuilding and optimising scalable processes to promote hyper-growthOwning business line metrics and improving people's performance, including decision-making quality and efficiencyEstablishing lasting relationships with vendors and partners to influence decisions for great deal-makingWhat You'll NeedAt least a 2:1 degree from a top universityExperience in engineering (graduates welcome to apply)Experience working in a structured, KPI-focused environment, such as a startupExperience managing large teams composed of direct and indirect reportsLeadership skills with a creative, confident, and motivational approachExcellent communication, interpersonal, and people management skillsThe ability to work in a fast-paced environment, managing multiple challenges simultaneouslyAn excellent problem-solving approach and demonstrated record of executing projects that measurably improved different metrics To be logical, analytical, and have experience resolving team productivity or quality issues in efficient waysThe ability to identify operational inefficiencies and provide practical solutionsThe ability to take a data-driven approach to identify root causes, measure performance, and drive process improvementsNice to haveExperience working with SQL, Python, and/or RCertifications in Lean Six SigmaBuilding a global financial super app isn’t enough. Our Revoluters are a priority, and that’s why in 2021 we launched our inaugural D&I Framework, designed to help us thrive and grow everyday. We're not just doing this because it's the right thing to do. We’re doing it because we know that seeking out diverse talent and creating an inclusive workplace is the way to create exceptional, innovative products and services for our customers. That’s why we encourage applications from people with diverse backgrounds and experiences to join this multicultural, hard-working team.Important notice for candidates:Job scams are on the rise. Please keep these guidelines in mind when applying for any open roles. Only apply through official Revolut channels. We don’t use any third-party services or platforms for our recruitment. Always double-check the emails you receive. Make sure all communications are being done through official Revolut emails, with an @revolut.com domain.We won't ask for payment or personal financial information during the hiring process. If anyone does ask you for this, it’s a scam. Report it immediately.By submitting this application, I confirm that all the information given by me in this application for employment and any additional documents attached hereto are true to the best of my knowledge and that I have not wilfully suppressed any material fact. I confirm I have disclosed if applicable any previous employment with Revolut. I accept that if any of the information given by me in this application is in any way false or incorrect, my application may be rejected, any offer of employment may be withdrawn or my employment with Revolut may be terminated summarily or I may be dismissed. By submitting this application, I agree that my personal data will be processed in accordance with Revolut's Candidate Privacy Notice
descriptionHtml:
About Revolut

People deserve more from their money. More visibility, more control, and more freedom. Since 2015, Revolut has been on a mission to deliver just that. Our powerhouse of products — including spending, saving, investing, exchanging, travelling, and more — help our 70+ million customers get more from their money every day.

As we continue our lightning-fast growth,‌ 2 things are essential to our success: our people and our culture. In recognition of our outstanding employee experience, we've been certified as a Great Place to Work™. So far, we have 13,000+ people working around the world, from our offices and remotely, to help us achieve our mission. And we're looking for more brilliant people. People who love building great products, redefining success, and turning the complexity of a chaotic world into the simplicity of a beautiful solution.

About The Role

At Revolut, Operations means problem-solving at scale. Our team tackles the company’s toughest challenges with speed, precision, and creativity. They design systems that unlock efficiency and power global growth.

We’re looking for a Production Operations Manager to manage teams of up to 100 agents. You'll be collaborating closely with product teams, leveraging your people and project management experience, to continuously focus on optimising processes.

Up to shape what's next in finance? Let's get in touch.

What You’ll Be Doing

  • Managing a team of direct and indirect reports
  • Exploring and defining which projects the team should prioritise, and setting a timeline to reach goals quickly
  • Taking responsibility for your team's development, guiding and working with them to unlock their full potential
  • Leading by example, resolving the toughest customer issues, and ensuring consistent high-level performance from the team
  • Interacting and collaborating with teams across the globe to constantly improve service levels
  • Making critical business decisions by breaking down complex business cases and backing up reasoning using advanced analysis
  • Proposing, developing, and implementing systems, programmes, and processes to strengthen the foundation of exceptional customer service
  • Building and optimising scalable processes to promote hyper-growth
  • Owning business line metrics and improving people's performance, including decision-making quality and efficiency
  • Establishing lasting relationships with vendors and partners to influence decisions for great deal-making

What You'll Need

  • At least a 2:1 degree from a top university
  • Experience in engineering (graduates welcome to apply)
  • Experience working in a structured, KPI-focused environment, such as a startup
  • Experience managing large teams composed of direct and indirect reports
  • Leadership skills with a creative, confident, and motivational approach
  • Excellent communication, interpersonal, and people management skills
  • The ability to work in a fast-paced environment, managing multiple challenges simultaneously
  • An excellent problem-solving approach and demonstrated record of executing projects that measurably improved different metrics
  • To be logical, analytical, and have experience resolving team productivity or quality issues in efficient ways
  • The ability to identify operational inefficiencies and provide practical solutions
  • The ability to take a data-driven approach to identify root causes, measure performance, and drive process improvements

Nice to have

  • Experience working with SQL, Python, and/or R
  • Certifications in Lean Six Sigma

Building a global financial super app isn’t enough. Our Revoluters are a priority, and that’s why in 2021 we launched our inaugural D&I Framework, designed to help us thrive and grow everyday. We're not just doing this because it's the right thing to do. We’re doing it because we know that seeking out diverse talent and creating an inclusive workplace is the way to create exceptional, innovative products and services for our customers. That’s why we encourage applications from people with diverse backgrounds and experiences to join this multicultural, hard-working team.

Important notice for candidates:

Job scams are on the rise. Please keep these guidelines in mind when applying for any open roles.

  • Only apply through official Revolut channels. We don’t use any third-party services or platforms for our recruitment.
  • Always double-check the emails you receive. Make sure all communications are being done through official Revolut emails, with an @revolut.com domain.

We won't ask for payment or personal financial information during the hiring process. If anyone does ask you for this, it’s a scam. Report it immediately.

By submitting this application, I confirm that all the information given by me in this application for employment and any additional documents attached hereto are true to the best of my knowledge and that I have not wilfully suppressed any material fact. I confirm I have disclosed if applicable any previous employment with Revolut. I accept that if any of the information given by me in this application is in any way false or incorrect, my application may be rejected, any offer of employment may be withdrawn or my employment with Revolut may be terminated summarily or I may be dismissed. By submitting this application, I agree that my personal data will be processed in accordance with Revolut's Candidate Privacy Notice

descriptionHtml:
The Opportunity


As a Director/Principal Platform Product Manager, you will lead our customer observability product offerings. You will develop and articulate the product vision and strategy for observability products. Seeking a strong Platform product manager, with a deep understanding of observability tools and practices, and a passion for building products that empower users to monitor, troubleshoot, and optimize their systems.


What You’ll Contribute


Product Strategy and Vision:

Develop and articulate the product vision and strategy for observability products.

Identify market opportunities, customer needs, and competitive landscape.

Define and prioritize product features and enhancements based on customer feedback, market trends, and business objectives.

Product Planning and Execution:

Create and maintain a detailed product roadmap, ensuring alignment with company goals and customer needs.

Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including engineering, design, marketing, and sales, to deliver high-quality products on time and within budget.

Manage the product lifecycle from concept to launch and post-launch support.

Customer and Stakeholder Engagement:

Engage with customers, partners, and stakeholders to gather feedback and understand their pain points and requirements.

Act as the voice of the customer, ensuring their needs are reflected in the product development process.

Conduct regular product demos, training sessions, and webinars to educate customers and stakeholders on new features and functionalities.

Metrics and Analysis:

Define and track key performance indicators (KPIs) to measure product success and identify areas for improvement.

Analyze product usage data and customer feedback to drive continuous improvement and innovation.

Prepare and present product performance reports to senior management and stakeholders.

Market and Industry Research:

Stay up-to-date with industry trends, emerging technologies, and competitive products in the observability space.

Conduct market research and competitive analysis to inform product decisions and strategy.

Identify potential partnerships and opportunities for collaboration to enhance product offerings.



What We’re Seeking


  • 10+ years of experience in product management, with a focus on observability, monitoring, or related technologies.
  • Strong understanding of observability principles, tools (e.g., Prometheus, Grafana, ELK stack), and best practices.
  • Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and decision-making skills.
  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to work effectively with cross-functional teams and stakeholders.
  • Experience with data-driven decision-making and a customer-centric approach to product development.
  • Passion for technology and a deep understanding of the software development lifecycle.
  • Bachelor’s/Master's degree in Engineering or Computer Science, or relevant experience; MBA or advanced degree preferred


About US

FICO is a leading analytics and decision management company that empowers businesses and individuals around the world with data-driven insights. Known for pioneering the FICO® Score, a standard in consumer credit risk assessment, FICO combines advanced analytics, machine learning, and sophisticated algorithms to drive smarter, faster decisions across industries. From financial services to retail, insurance, and healthcare, FICO's innovative solutions help organizations make precise decisions, reduce risk, and enhance customer experiences. With a strong commitment to ethical use of AI and data, FICO is dedicated to improving financial access and inclusivity, fostering trust, and driving growth for a digitally evolving world

descriptionHtml:
Our Purpose

Mastercard powers economies and empowers people in 200+ countries and territories worldwide. Together with our customers, we’re helping build a sustainable economy where everyone can prosper. We support a wide range of digital payments choices, making transactions secure, simple, smart and accessible. Our technology and innovation, partnerships and networks combine to deliver a unique set of products and services that help people, businesses and governments realize their greatest potential.

Title And Summary

Director – AI Strategy & Product Management (Agentic AI)

________________________________________

Director – AI Strategy & Product Management (Agentic AI)

Operational Intelligence | Mastercard Services

Location: Pune / Gurgaon | Level: Director (L5)

________________________________________

Overview

Mastercard’s Operational Intelligence (OI) team is building agentic AI and LLM-driven platforms to transform payment operations.

We are hiring a Director – AI Strategy & Product Management to lead strategy, product development, UX, and execution of enterprise AI products, including multi-agent systems, decision platforms, and autonomous workflows.

This is a hands-on 0→1 leadership role evolving into team and program leadership at scale.

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

AI Strategy & Product Leadership

  • Define agentic AI strategy and roadmap across OI
  • Own 0→1→scale lifecycle (PRD → MVP → Production)
  • Deliver AI products across reconciliation, disputes, and operations


________________________________________

Agentic Systems & Architecture Alignment

  • Define product requirements for:
  • Multi-agent systems (LangGraph, LangChain, etc.)
  • Stateful workflows, guardrails, and HITL
  • Partner with engineering on LLMs, RAG, Graph RAG, and MCP-based systems


________________________________________

Agentic UI/UX Design

  • Design beyond chat UX:
  • Structured workflows, dashboards, and controls
  • Build:
  • Trust layer (explainability, transparency)
  • Control layer (HITL, overrides)
  • Observability layer (agent actions, traces)


________________________________________

Program Office & Portfolio Management

  • Establish and lead AI Program Office (PMO)
  • Manage portfolio of AI products, platforms, and initiatives
  • Drive prioritization, capacity planning, and executive reporting


________________________________________

POC & Experimentation Leadership

  • Lead POC → MVP → Production pipeline
  • Define success metrics (business + technical)
  • Ensure scalable design and avoid “POC traps”


________________________________________

Data, Models & Platform Integration

  • Drive integration of:
  • LLMs (GPT, Claude, LLaMA, etc.)
  • Enterprise data platforms
  • Define requirements for:
  • Retrieval (vector + graph)
  • Memory systems (short/long-term, semantic, graph)


________________________________________

Observability, Governance & Evaluation

  • Define frameworks for:
  • Agent observability (AgentOps)
  • Evaluation (accuracy, grounding, latency)
  • Responsible AI and compliance


________________________________________

Business Impact & GTM

  • Partner with engineering and commercial teams
  • Drive product adoption, monetization, and ROI
  • Track automation, cost savings, and revenue uplift


________________________________________

Qualifications

  • 12–15+ years in AI/ML product management or technical strategy
  • Proven experience building AI/GenAI products (0→1→scale)
  • Strong understanding of:
  • LLMs, RAG, Graph RAG, agentic systems
  • Experience working closely with engineering on scalable platforms


Preferred: Payments, fintech, or operational intelligence experience

Corporate Security Responsibility

 All activities involving access to Mastercard assets, information, and networks comes with an inherent risk to the organization and, therefore, it is expected that every person working for, or on behalf of, Mastercard is responsible for information security and must:

  • Abide by Mastercard’s security policies and practices;
  • Ensure the confidentiality and integrity of the information being accessed;
  • Report any suspected information security violation or breach, and
  • Complete all periodic mandatory security trainings in accordance with Mastercard’s guidelines.

descriptionHtml:
Company Description

Experian unlocks the power of data to create opportunities for consumers, businesses and society. We gather and analyse data in ways others can't. We help individuals take financial control and access financial services, businesses make smarter decision and succeed, lenders lend more responsibly, and organisations prevent identity fraud and crime. For more than 125 years, we've helped consumers and clients prosper, and economies and communities flourish – and we're not done. Our 17,800 people in 45 countries believe the possibilities for you, and our world, are growing. We're investing in new technologies, experienced people and new ideas so we can help create a better tomorrow.

Job Description

What you need to have

  • 8-12 Years of experience in the financial services industry in a product role or business intelligence domain with strong understanding of lending business, payments in the digital team of a Bank, large NBFC or a Fintech.
  • Agile Product development and Data Analytics expertise
  • Experience in actively supporting sales teams achieve revenues and EBIT targets
  • Product Life-cycle experience
  • Preferably should have handled customer lifecycle for D2C & B2B business lines.
  • Experience of collaborative working with cross functional teams

What You’ll Be Accountable For

  • Ownership of overall Product Development and Management for all bureau, analytics and decision products and services.
  • Drive Product Revenue and EBIT targets along with Sales teams
  • Lead Business Case production in line with execution of the roadmap defining investment scale and return on Investment, Payback, etc.
  • Lead initiatives to analyse complex business problems and issues using data from internal and external sources.
  • Build the product roadmap defining short, medium and long-term views for the evolution of all products including addition of 3rd party data and services.
  • Build and Drive GTM activities in close collaboration with Sales and Marketing teams.
  • Build and anchor the Research, Insight and Thought Leadership publications. Manage the rendering platform for products like standard insights.
  • Manage the scoping and development of enhancements to existing products and solutions with the India/Regional technology teams.
  • Ensuring continuous upskilling of team members technical and communication skills.
  • Internal design consultation for Strategic Accounts, support pre-sales with additional technical and design insights and providing solutions to complex customer problem statements. Drive the scoping and delivery for projects based on client requirements.
  • Keeping self and team updated with new approaches and trends in statistical analysis and data visualisation.

How We Will Measure Your Success

  • New Products / Innovation Revenue
  • Establish Thought Leadership
  • Improving Product EBIT
  • Deliver product roadmap within agreed TAT
  • Deliver platform capacity to align with pipeline and revenue forecasts
  • Support achievement of Revenue Targets by:
  • Delivering the agreed Product roadmap
  • Producing documentation to assist GTM
  • Ensuring the timely availability of the products and solutions
  • Consulting with strategic deals in the Pre-sales phase to support deal closure

Qualifications

  • Strong understanding of the consumer and commercial lending ecosystem and its associated data
  • Ability to work with diverse data sets with an analytical bent of mind
  • Ability to ideate & innovate and strong execution capabilities along with working under tight timelines. Knowledge both of B2B & D2C will be an added advantage.
  • Product Management understanding including product development, commercial acumen and GTM knowledge
  • Demonstrated experience in consulting, solution development and selling
  • Excellent communication, written and presentation skills
  • Strong Program Management skills
  • Proven leadership, coaching and development capabilities
  • Team player, performance driven individual with excellent time-management skills
  • Used to working under tight time pressure, great sense of priority management
  • High level of communication and personal presence
  • Strong market knowledge of latest innovations in the data analytics space and its associated utilization in various industries

Additional Information

Role Location: Mumbai

Experian Careers - Creating a better tomorrow together

Find out what its like to work for Experian by clicking here

title: Product Director – AI & Intelligent Workflows
description: Vialto is a market leader in global mobility services. Our purpose is to Make global work better. We are unique and the only stand-alone global mobility business. This presents a rare opportunity for our clients, stakeholders, and colleagues.Our teams help companies streamline and effectively manage their global mobility programs in a cost-efficient and compliant manner. Our services focus on providing cross-border compliance and risk assessment for tax, immigration, business travel, rewards and compensation, and remote work.Working at Vialto is about getting the chance to be part of a global and dynamic team. Globally, we have over 7,100 staff in 50 countries around the world and continues to grow. You will work with clients from a range of industries and different geographical locations. We believe in connecting the world and supporting our colleagues to do the same in their careers by undertaking assignments and opportunities globally that broaden their skills and ultimately benefit our clients.Vialto is unstoppable when we work together in a culture of belonging, where everyone can thrive. We encourage employees to bring their true selves and share their unique talents and expertise to positively impact the communities we serve. To learn more about what we do, tune in to our podcast On the Move to hear expert insights on issues affecting global mobility, and read about the latest news in the industry. You can also follow us on LinkedIn and Instagram.We are building the next generation of its global mobility platform, technology that processes over 500K tax cases, 250K visa applications, and 500K business travel assessments each year. This role sits at the center of enterprise workflow automation, applied AI, and large‑scale operational transformation. We are establishing a new product leadership hub in Bangalore, and this position will play a foundational role in shaping the product, team, culture, and AI‑driven capabilities of our platform. This is a high‑impact, 0-1 opportunity for a product leader passionate about complex workflows, AI‑enabled digital experiences, and building teams from the ground up.What You’ll OwnDefine product vision, strategy, and roadmap for a core domain within Vialto’s global mobility platform. Build and lead cross‑functional product pods (engineering, AI/ML, data, design) in Bangalore.Initial build: one pod of ~5 engineers Rapid expansion to a second pod Drive product discovery, experimentation, and prototyping using data insights, user research, and iterative development. Translate complex immigration, tax, and mobility workflows into intelligent, AI‑powered platform capabilities. Identify and embed opportunities for automation, LLM-driven enhancements, and intelligent workflows. Partner closely with global engineering and product leaders in the US and UK.  Influence the broader platform strategy as we transition to a unified Global Work Cloud architecture. Operate hands‑on early, hiring the team, shaping processes, and establishing a strong product culture.What Makes This Role UniqueHigh-volume, real-world impact: Your work shapes the tools used by thousands of employees globally. Platform in active transformation: Opportunities to re-architect, simplify, and modernize at scale.  AI-first charter: A mandate to integrate automation and intelligent decisioning into mission-critical workflows. Leadership visibility: This role sits on the VVN Bangalore leadership team and directly influences enterprise product direction. Greenfield team building: You’ll shape a new product capability in Bangalore from day one.Experience8–10+ years of product management experience, ideally in:Enterprise platforms Workflow automation toolsSaaS or internal systems Regulated or professional services environments Proven success defining strategy and shipping high‑impact digital products. Experience working with AI/ML, LLM-driven capabilities, intelligent workflows, and data-driven experimentation.Strong cross-functional leadership experience; engineering, AI, design, and data.Hands-on builder mindset; experience creating or scaling product teams from early stages.Operating in ambiguity, simplifying complexity, and driving clarity.Excellent communication and storytelling skills. Ability to influence global stakeholders across time zones. Strong problem‑solving instincts and domain learning agility.Tools & Technologies (Preferred)Experience with AI/LLM frameworks and workflow automation Familiarity with prototyping tools (e.g., Figma / Figma Make) Exposure to AI development frameworks (e.g., BMAD) Comfort working with modern engineering and data stacks Use of Copilot or similar productivity/AI toolsAdditional InformationLocation: Bangalore Employment Type: Full TimeWork Arrangement: Hybrid: 3–4 days per week onsite Travel: Occasional trips to the US/UK We are an equal opportunity employer that does not discriminate based on any legally protected status.Please note, AI is used as part of the application process.
descriptionHtml:
Vialto is a market leader in global mobility services. Our purpose is to Make global work better. We are unique and the only stand-alone global mobility business. This presents a rare opportunity for our clients, stakeholders, and colleagues.

Our teams help companies streamline and effectively manage their global mobility programs in a cost-efficient and compliant manner. Our services focus on providing cross-border compliance and risk assessment for tax, immigration, business travel, rewards and compensation, and remote work.

Working at Vialto is about getting the chance to be part of a global and dynamic team. Globally, we have over 7,100 staff in 50 countries around the world and continues to grow. You will work with clients from a range of industries and different geographical locations. We believe in connecting the world and supporting our colleagues to do the same in their careers by undertaking assignments and opportunities globally that broaden their skills and ultimately benefit our clients.

Vialto is unstoppable when we work together in a culture of belonging, where everyone can thrive. We encourage employees to bring their true selves and share their unique talents and expertise to positively impact the communities we serve. To learn more about what we do, tune in to our podcast On the Move to hear expert insights on issues affecting global mobility, and read about the latest news in the industry. You can also follow us on LinkedIn and Instagram.

We are building the next generation of its global mobility platform, technology that processes over 500K tax cases, 250K visa applications, and 500K business travel assessments each year. This role sits at the center of enterprise workflow automation, applied AI, and large‑scale operational transformation. We are establishing a new product leadership hub in Bangalore, and this position will play a foundational role in shaping the product, team, culture, and AI‑driven capabilities of our platform. This is a high‑impact, 0-1 opportunity for a product leader passionate about complex workflows, AI‑enabled digital experiences, and building teams from the ground up.

What You’ll Own
  • Define product vision, strategy, and roadmap for a core domain within Vialto’s global mobility platform. 
  • Build and lead cross‑functional product pods (engineering, AI/ML, data, design) in Bangalore.
  • Initial build: one pod of ~5 engineers 
  • Rapid expansion to a second pod 
  • Drive product discovery, experimentation, and prototyping using data insights, user research, and iterative development. 
  • Translate complex immigration, tax, and mobility workflows into intelligent, AI‑powered platform capabilities. 
  • Identify and embed opportunities for automation, LLM-driven enhancements, and intelligent workflows. 
  • Partner closely with global engineering and product leaders in the US and UK.  Influence the broader platform strategy as we transition to a unified Global Work Cloud architecture. 
  • Operate hands‑on early, hiring the team, shaping processes, and establishing a strong product culture.
What Makes This Role Unique
  • High-volume, real-world impact: Your work shapes the tools used by thousands of employees globally. 
  • Platform in active transformation: Opportunities to re-architect, simplify, and modernize at scale. 
  • AI-first charter: A mandate to integrate automation and intelligent decisioning into mission-critical workflows. 
  • Leadership visibility: This role sits on the VVN Bangalore leadership team and directly influences enterprise product direction. 
  • Greenfield team building: You’ll shape a new product capability in Bangalore from day one.
Experience
  • 8–10+ years of product management experience, ideally in:
    • Enterprise platforms 
    • Workflow automation tools
    • SaaS or internal systems 
    • Regulated or professional services environments 
  • Proven success defining strategy and shipping high‑impact digital products. 
  • Experience working with AI/ML, LLM-driven capabilities, intelligent workflows, and data-driven experimentation.
  • Strong cross-functional leadership experience; engineering, AI, design, and data.
  • Hands-on builder mindset; experience creating or scaling product teams from early stages.
  • Operating in ambiguity, simplifying complexity, and driving clarity.
  • Excellent communication and storytelling skills. 
  • Ability to influence global stakeholders across time zones. 
  • Strong problem‑solving instincts and domain learning agility.
Tools & Technologies (Preferred)
  • Experience with AI/LLM frameworks and workflow automation 
  • Familiarity with prototyping tools (e.g., Figma / Figma Make) Exposure to AI development frameworks (e.g., BMAD) 
  • Comfort working with modern engineering and data stacks 
  • Use of Copilot or similar productivity/AI tools
Additional Information
  • Location: Bangalore 
  • Employment Type: Full Time
  • Work Arrangement: Hybrid: 3–4 days per week onsite 
  • Travel: Occasional trips to the US/UK 
  • We are an equal opportunity employer that does not discriminate based on any legally protected status.
  • Please note, AI is used as part of the application process.

descriptionHtml:
Candescent is a forward-thinking technology company transforming how financial institutions deliver Intelligent Banking experiences. We unite digital banking, account opening, and branch solutions that power and connect digital banking, account opening, and branch solutions—creating seamless engagement across digital, remote, and in-person channels.

Our Experience-Led, Intelligence-Driven approach combines human-centered design with data, automation, and cloud-based innovation. Built on an API-first architecture, our extensible ecosystem enables institutions to adapt quickly, integrate easily, and unlock new opportunities for growth—turning every customer interaction into a moment of clarity, confidence, and connection.

We are seeking a Product Director to define the strategy and vision for our Consumer Products. This role provides leadership while delivering cohesive, high-quality experiences that communicate value effectively.

The Product Director owns prioritization and roadmap planning ,balancing platform changes, technical constraints, and business needs. This role drives alignment across engineering, product, and data teams, manages dependencies, and ensures demo strategy remains current with market trends, customer expectations, and broader business objectives.

Qualifications 

  • 10+ years of experience in software, platform, or solution leadership roles, with fintech, banking, or complex regulated-industry experience preferred
  • Bachelor’s degree required in a relevant field (e.g., computer science, information systems, engineering, or business); advanced degree preferred or equivalent practical experience
  • Demonstrated ability to define strategy and priorities for complex, cross-functional initiatives in fast-moving technical environments
  • Strong understanding of modern cloud platforms and distributed systems, with experience aligning demo or solution environments to multi-tenant, platform-based architectures
  • Experience translating customer needs, market trends, and platform capabilities into clear roadmaps and high-impact demonstration experiences
  • Excellent communication and executive presentation skills, with confidence engaging senior stakeholders and external audiences
  • High degree of curiosity and initiative, with a track record of staying current on technology trends that influence platform capabilities and customer expectations

Statement to Third Party Agencies

To ALL recruitment agencies: Candescent only accepts resumes from agencies on the preferred supplier list. Please do not forward resumes to our applicant tracking system, Candescent employees, or any Candescent facility. Candescent is not responsible for any fees or charges associated with unsolicited resumes.

descriptionHtml:
Our Purpose

Mastercard powers economies and empowers people in 200+ countries and territories worldwide. Together with our customers, we’re helping build a sustainable economy where everyone can prosper. We support a wide range of digital payments choices, making transactions secure, simple, smart and accessible. Our technology and innovation, partnerships and networks combine to deliver a unique set of products and services that help people, businesses and governments realize their greatest potential.

Title And Summary

Director, Product Management – Data and AI Platform

Director, Product Management – Data and AI Platform

WHO IS MASTERCARD?

Mastercard is a global technology company in the payments industry. Our mission is to connect and power an inclusive, digital economy that benefits everyone, everywhere by making transactions safe, simple, smart, and accessible. Using secure data and networks, partnerships, and passion, our innovations help individuals, financial institutions, governments, and businesses realize their greatest potential.

Overview

Mastercard is building a cloud-native data platform to power next-generation, data-driven solutions and services. This platform will deliver a data mesh architecture, advanced technologies, and processes that enable Mastercard to scale and innovate at speed.

We are seeking a strategic product leader to join our Data and AI Platform team. In this role, you will define the vision, set the long-term strategy, and lead execution for Mastercard’s Data and AI platform. You will collaborate across internal teams and external partners to deliver impactful solutions that align with Mastercard’s enterprise goals. This is an exciting opportunity to shape a Data and AI platform from ground up.

What You’ll Do

  • Define and own the product vision and long-term strategy for 2 domains of Mastercard’s Data and AI platform, ensuring alignment with business objectives.
  • Establish domain roadmap(s) that supports critical business areas and platform capabilities including:
  • Data ingestion landing zones
  • Network, IAM, KMS, secrets
  • Compute provisioning & isolation
  • Base SLAs (availability, performance, DR)
  • Partner (Databricks & Snowflake) enablement
  • AI/ML tooling integration
  • Influence and collaborate with stakeholders across engineering, product management, and operations to align platform strategy with business goals.
  • Advocate for and implement modern data architecture principles (data lakes, data warehouses, data meshes) to drive innovation and scalability.
  • Partner closely with engineering counterparts, participating in technical discussions and leading requirement workshops.


What You Bring

  • 8+ years of experience leading product teams in the Data & AI space within enterprise environments, ideally in a matrix organization.
  • Hands-on experience with AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud, and familiarity with AI/ML platforms such as Databricks and Snowflake.
  • Deep understanding of core building blocks and run time services needed to build a Data and AI platform is critical.
  • Deep understanding of the Data and AI platform landscape, architectural patterns, and emerging technologies.
  • Previous experience as a data engineer or data scientist is a strong advantage, especially in building AI/ML solutions for B2B.
  • Ability to foster a product-driven culture and champion best practices across the organization.
  • Proven experience building and leading cross-functional teams (product, design, data/software engineering, security, etc.) but also act as a subject matter expert as needed.
  • Exceptional leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to influence at all levels.
  • Entrepreneurial mindset with agility and a bias for action in a fast-paced environment.


Why Join Us?

At Mastercard, you’ll lead transformative initiatives that shape the future of data and AI in payments and digital commerce. You’ll have the opportunity to innovate at scale, collaborate with world-class teams, and make a global impact.

Corporate Security Responsibility

 All activities involving access to Mastercard assets, information, and networks comes with an inherent risk to the organization and, therefore, it is expected that every person working for, or on behalf of, Mastercard is responsible for information security and must:

  • Abide by Mastercard’s security policies and practices;
  • Ensure the confidentiality and integrity of the information being accessed;
  • Report any suspected information security violation or breach, and
  • Complete all periodic mandatory security trainings in accordance with Mastercard’s guidelines.
