descriptionHtml:
We are seeking an Engineering Leader with strong expertise in Python and front-end technologies along with hands-on DevOps skills, proven experience in client management, and the ability to lead and inspire engineering teams. In this role, you will drive technical strategy, oversee solution delivery for leading banks, and ensure seamless collaboration between clients and internal teams. Ideal candidates bring a mix of hands-on technical depth and executive-level leadership skills to scale innovative fintech solutions.


Key Responsibilities:

  • Lead, mentor, and manage a diverse engineering team of 20 professionals across frontend, backend, and DevOps functions.
  • Drive the end-to-end delivery of high-quality software products and features.
  • Collaborate with product management, design, and other stakeholders to define technical requirements and roadmaps.
  • Oversee the development, deployment, and maintenance of scalable applications and infrastructure.
  • Implement best practices for software development, testing, deployment, and monitoring.
  • Foster a culture of continuous improvement, innovation, and collaboration within the team.
  • Manage team performance, conduct regular reviews, and support professional development.
  • Coordinate cross-functional initiatives and ensure timely delivery of projects.
  • Stay updated with the latest technologies and trends in frontend, backend, and DevOps to drive technical excellence.


Required Skills and Qualifications:

  • 10-12+ years of professional experience in software engineering, with at least 3 years in a managerial or leadership role.
  • Proven experience managing teams of 20+ engineers.
  • Strong technical expertise in frontend technologies (e.g., React, Angular, Vue.js).
  • Solid experience in backend development (e.g., Node.js, Java, Python, .NET).
  • Hands-on experience with DevOps practices and tools (CI/CD, containerization, cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP).
  • Experience in managing mobile applications will be considered an advantage.
  • Excellent leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills.
  • Ability to manage multiple priorities and drive projects to completion.
  • Strong problem-solving skills and a passion for technical innovation.


Preferred Qualifications:

  • Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments.
  • Familiarity with microservices architecture and cloud-native applications.
  • Prior experience in a fast-paced startup or tech company is preferred

title: Director, Product Operations
sector: Financial Services, IT Services and IT Consulting, and Technology, Information and Internet
description: Our PurposeMastercard powers economies and empowers people in 200+ countries and territories worldwide. Together with our customers, we’re helping build a sustainable economy where everyone can prosper. We support a wide range of digital payments choices, making transactions secure, simple, smart and accessible. Our technology and innovation, partnerships and networks combine to deliver a unique set of products and services that help people, businesses and governments realize their greatest potential.Title And SummaryDirector, Product OperationsJob Description SummaryDirector, Network ProductsOverviewThe Director, Network Products, will join a team driving product strategy, roadmap, and execution of the future of Mastercard’s global core payments network. The payments network is Mastercard’s core strategic asset, directly driving over $8 billion in revenue and providing the platform for other key products and services.The ideal candidate is a proven, forward thinking leader with the ability to collaborate across disciplines and communicate effectively with both business and technology stakeholders. This role will work hand in hand with Product Managers and Engineering teams to deliver operationally ready, market leading solutions. Responsibilities span customer enablement during pilot and prototype phases; articulation of value propositions and requirements; partnership with internal and external development teams; commercialization and go to market planning; customer engagement and feedback loops; implementation and integration oversight; and oversight into product documentation and operational guidelines.The Role Deliver clear, consistent executive level communications by monitoring overall program health, synthesizing project and customer onboarding status, and translating insights into actionable recommendations for senior leadership and key stakeholders. Lead, mentor, and scale a global Product Operations Customer Experience team, fostering a culture of accountability, operational excellence, and coordinated execution across multiple stakeholders and parallel initiatives. Define and champion the strategic vision for the Product Operations Customer Experience team, ensuring alignment with enterprise objectives while continuously evolving delivery models, processes, and governance to support long term scalability and success. Partner with internal stakeholders to support product management and development efforts across all new and enhanced Network Product solutions, including piloting and testing activities, and co developing customer communications, guides, and operational documentation. Engage with internal product teams, business owners, regional market teams, and global customers to identify, assess, and address network challenges and opportunities. Analyze internal data to size opportunities and issues, understand customer behaviors, and develop informed perspectives on system, platform, and technical constraints underlying business needs. Collaborate with a diverse set of internal partners, regional stakeholders, and external customers to define, deliver, and continuously improve the end to end customer onboarding experience. Lead customer feedback engagements to identify pain points, inform roadmap prioritization, and support proactive customer management during incidents or service disruptions. Demonstrate intellectual curiosity, high energy, and a self starter mindset, with the ability to operate with urgency in a fast paced, evolving environment. Exhibit strong prioritization discipline and comfort operating in ambiguity, while empowering teams to own and deliver a high quality customer onboarding experience. Effectively manage multiple priorities and complex demands, supported by a strong understanding of transaction processing and the credit card payments industry.About You Brings deep expertise in the payments industry, the Mastercard ecosystem, or the broader financial services landscape, with a strong understanding of how technology delivery drives business outcomes. Operates with a high degree of independence and accountability, demonstrating sound judgment and end to end ownership of program delivery. Builds strong, trusted relationships across the organization and effectively influences stakeholders at all levels, including senior and executive leadership, while establishing credibility with cross functional teams. Demonstrates strong people leadership by attracting, developing, and retaining top talent, and fostering an environment that promotes growth, accountability, and high performance. Applies continuous improvement principles to enhance customer delivery frameworks, operational processes, and overall team efficiency. Makes thoughtful, data driven decisions by assessing risks, managing trade offs, and resolving escalations in fast moving, complex environments. Leverages emerging technologies, including artificial intelligence, to improve program management practices, increase operational efficiency, and support more informed decision making. Exhibits a self starter mindset with a strong ability to learn quickly, work independently, thrive in fast paced environments, and adapt to shifting priorities while managing multiple responsibilities. Possesses exceptional communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills, with the ability to engage, lead, and influence stakeholders across all levels of the organization, as well as internal and external partners. Demonstrates strong visual storytelling capabilities, including data visualization and the creation of clear, compelling executive level presentations. Brings strong project management capabilities, with demonstrated excellence in organization, planning, and task execution. Is a highly collaborative partner, able to work effectively across functions to drive shared outcomes.Corporate Security Responsibility All activities involving access to Mastercard assets, information, and networks comes with an inherent risk to the organization and, therefore, it is expected that every person working for, or on behalf of, Mastercard is responsible for information security and must:Abide by Mastercard’s security policies and practices;Ensure the confidentiality and integrity of the information being accessed;Report any suspected information security violation or breach, andComplete all periodic mandatory security trainings in accordance with Mastercard’s guidelines.
descriptionHtml:
Our Purpose

Mastercard powers economies and empowers people in 200+ countries and territories worldwide. Together with our customers, we’re helping build a sustainable economy where everyone can prosper. We support a wide range of digital payments choices, making transactions secure, simple, smart and accessible. Our technology and innovation, partnerships and networks combine to deliver a unique set of products and services that help people, businesses and governments realize their greatest potential.

Title And Summary

Director, Product Operations

Job Description Summary

Director, Network Products

Overview

The Director, Network Products, will join a team driving product strategy, roadmap, and execution of the future of Mastercard’s global core payments network. The payments network is Mastercard’s core strategic asset, directly driving over $8 billion in revenue and providing the platform for other key products and services.

The ideal candidate is a proven, forward thinking leader with the ability to collaborate across disciplines and communicate effectively with both business and technology stakeholders. This role will work hand in hand with Product Managers and Engineering teams to deliver operationally ready, market leading solutions. Responsibilities span customer enablement during pilot and prototype phases; articulation of value propositions and requirements; partnership with internal and external development teams; commercialization and go to market planning; customer engagement and feedback loops; implementation and integration oversight; and oversight into product documentation and operational guidelines.

The Role

  • Deliver clear, consistent executive level communications by monitoring overall program health, synthesizing project and customer onboarding status, and translating insights into actionable recommendations for senior leadership and key stakeholders.
  • Lead, mentor, and scale a global Product Operations Customer Experience team, fostering a culture of accountability, operational excellence, and coordinated execution across multiple stakeholders and parallel initiatives.
  • Define and champion the strategic vision for the Product Operations Customer Experience team, ensuring alignment with enterprise objectives while continuously evolving delivery models, processes, and governance to support long term scalability and success.
  • Partner with internal stakeholders to support product management and development efforts across all new and enhanced Network Product solutions, including piloting and testing activities, and co developing customer communications, guides, and operational documentation.
  • Engage with internal product teams, business owners, regional market teams, and global customers to identify, assess, and address network challenges and opportunities.
  • Analyze internal data to size opportunities and issues, understand customer behaviors, and develop informed perspectives on system, platform, and technical constraints underlying business needs.
  • Collaborate with a diverse set of internal partners, regional stakeholders, and external customers to define, deliver, and continuously improve the end to end customer onboarding experience.
  • Lead customer feedback engagements to identify pain points, inform roadmap prioritization, and support proactive customer management during incidents or service disruptions.
  • Demonstrate intellectual curiosity, high energy, and a self starter mindset, with the ability to operate with urgency in a fast paced, evolving environment.
  • Exhibit strong prioritization discipline and comfort operating in ambiguity, while empowering teams to own and deliver a high quality customer onboarding experience.
  • Effectively manage multiple priorities and complex demands, supported by a strong understanding of transaction processing and the credit card payments industry.


About You

  • Brings deep expertise in the payments industry, the Mastercard ecosystem, or the broader financial services landscape, with a strong understanding of how technology delivery drives business outcomes.
  • Operates with a high degree of independence and accountability, demonstrating sound judgment and end to end ownership of program delivery.
  • Builds strong, trusted relationships across the organization and effectively influences stakeholders at all levels, including senior and executive leadership, while establishing credibility with cross functional teams.
  • Demonstrates strong people leadership by attracting, developing, and retaining top talent, and fostering an environment that promotes growth, accountability, and high performance.
  • Applies continuous improvement principles to enhance customer delivery frameworks, operational processes, and overall team efficiency.
  • Makes thoughtful, data driven decisions by assessing risks, managing trade offs, and resolving escalations in fast moving, complex environments.
  • Leverages emerging technologies, including artificial intelligence, to improve program management practices, increase operational efficiency, and support more informed decision making.
  • Exhibits a self starter mindset with a strong ability to learn quickly, work independently, thrive in fast paced environments, and adapt to shifting priorities while managing multiple responsibilities.
  • Possesses exceptional communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills, with the ability to engage, lead, and influence stakeholders across all levels of the organization, as well as internal and external partners.
  • Demonstrates strong visual storytelling capabilities, including data visualization and the creation of clear, compelling executive level presentations.
  • Brings strong project management capabilities, with demonstrated excellence in organization, planning, and task execution.
  • Is a highly collaborative partner, able to work effectively across functions to drive shared outcomes.


Corporate Security Responsibility

 All activities involving access to Mastercard assets, information, and networks comes with an inherent risk to the organization and, therefore, it is expected that every person working for, or on behalf of, Mastercard is responsible for information security and must:

  • Abide by Mastercard’s security policies and practices;
  • Ensure the confidentiality and integrity of the information being accessed;
  • Report any suspected information security violation or breach, and
  • Complete all periodic mandatory security trainings in accordance with Mastercard’s guidelines.

title: Director of Organic Growth
description: About LearneoLearneo is a platform of builder-driven businesses, including Course Hero, CliffsNotes, LitCharts, Quillbot, Symbolab, and Scribbr, all united around a shared mission of supercharging productivity and learning for everyone. We attract and scale high growth businesses built and run by visionary entrepreneurs. Each team innovates independently but has a unique opportunity to collaborate, experiment, and grow together, and they are supported by centralized corporate operations functions, including HR, Finance and Legal. Role OverviewWe are looking for a strategic, high-ownership Director of Organic Growth to lead and scale QuillBot’s organic acquisition engine across all major discovery surfaces. This role goes well beyond traditional SEO—you will own the full spectrum of organic growth, including Search Engine Optimization (SEO), App Store Optimization (ASO), Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), and Extension Store visibility (Chrome Web Store, Safari Extensions Gallery, and others). As a Director, you will set the vision, build and manage the roadmap, and lead the existing SEO & Organic Growth team. You’ll partner closely with Product, Engineering, Content, Brand, and International teams to embed organic growth into QuillBot’s product and go-to-market strategy. Your work will directly influence organic traffic, sales, install volume, revenue, and brand visibility on a global scale.ResponsibilitiesStrategy & LeadershipOrganic Growth Strategy: Define and own the overarching organic growth strategy spanning SEO, ASO, GEO, and Extension Store optimization. Set quarterly and annual OKRs tied to impressions, clicks, MAU, installs, and sales. Team Leadership: Manage, mentor, and develop the SEO & Organic Growth team. Foster a culture of experimentation, accountability, and continuous learning. Identify and hire for key capability gaps as needed.Roadmap Ownership: Build and maintain a prioritized organic growth roadmap. Balance quick wins with longer-term strategic bets. Present plans and progress to senior leadership, including the CEO.Cross-Functional Partnership: Serve as the organic growth voice in cross-functional planning with AI, Product, Engineering, Content, Brand, Marketing Operations, and International Expansion teams. Ensure organic considerations are embedded in product launches, site architecture decisions, and content strategy.Product Roadmap Influence: Act as a key influencer of the Product roadmap by surfacing organic growth opportunities, user intent data, and search landscape insights that shape feature prioritization, new product bets, and go-to-market timing.Search Engine Optimization (SEO)SEO Program Ownership: Own end-to-end SEO performance across QuillBot’s web properties. Drive strategy across on-page, off-page, and technical SEO to secure and defend top positions for high-value keywords.Technical SEO: Lead technical audits and partner with Engineering to resolve crawlability, indexation, Core Web Vitals, site speed, structured data, and mobile-responsiveness issues at scale.Content & Keyword Strategy: Oversee keyword research, content gap analysis, and on-page optimization. Collaborate with the Content team to ensure every page is strategically targeted and continuously improved.Link Building & Authority: Direct link-building and digital PR strategies to grow domain authority. Evaluate backlink quality and build partnerships with authoritative sites.Algorithm Resilience: Monitor Google algorithm updates, diagnose ranking fluctuations, and quickly adapt strategies to protect and grow organic traffic.Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO)GEO Strategy: Develop and execute a strategy to maximize QuillBot’s visibility in AI-generated answers and citations across generative search experiences (e.g., Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, etc).Content for LLMs: Work with Content and Product to structure information, schema markup, and authoritative content so that generative engines accurately surface and recommend QuillBot.Measurement & Experimentation: Define GEO-specific metrics, build tracking frameworks, and run experiments to understand how generative surfaces drive traffic and conversions.Competitive Intelligence: Monitor how competitors are cited in generative answers and identify opportunities to increase QuillBot’s share of voice.App Store Optimisation (ASO)ASO Program Ownership: Own QuillBot’s organic discoverability and conversion rates in the Apple App Store and Google Play Store.Listing Optimization: Optimize app titles, subtitles, descriptions, keywords, screenshots, and preview videos to improve search rankings and download conversion rates.Ratings & Reviews: Develop strategies to increase the volume and quality of positive ratings and reviews, and work with Product to address recurring user feedback themes.A/B Testing: Design and run store listing experiments to continuously improve conversion. Leverage tools like Google Play Experiments and third-party ASO platforms.Market-Specific ASO: Partner with the International Expansion team to localize and optimize listings for priority markets.Extension Store OptimisationExtension Visibility: Own QuillBot’s presence and discoverability in the Chrome Web Store, Safari Extensions Gallery, Microsoft Edge Add-ons, and Firefox Add-ons.Listing & CRO: Optimize extension titles, descriptions, screenshots, and feature graphics. Improve install conversion rates through iterative testing.Ratings & Review Strategy: Drive rating volume and quality for extensions. Coordinate with Product and Support to address negative feedback and reduce churn.Cross-Channel Synergy: Align extension store strategy with SEO and ASO efforts to create a unified organic discovery experience across web, app, and extension surfaces.Analytics, Reporting & InsightsPerformance Measurement: Build and maintain dashboards tracking organic performance across all channels (SEO, ASO, GEO, Extension Stores). Define KPIs and ensure the team is data-driven in decision-making.Executive Reporting: Deliver regular performance updates and strategic insights to senior leadership. Translate complex organic data into clear narratives with actionable recommendations.Tool Stack: Evaluate and manage the organic growth tool stack (e.g., Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Sensor Tower, Screaming Frog, etc).Qualifications8–10 years of progressive experience in SEO and/or organic growth, with at least 3 years in a people-management role.Global experience: demonstrated ability to drive organic growth across multiple markets, regions, and languages—not limited to English-speaking audiences.Demonstrated success managing organic growth for a high-traffic website (+20M monthly active users) and a consumer app with significant install volume.Proven track record of securing and defending #1 positions for competitive keywordsProven ability to build organic visibility from zero for new product launches in highly competitive markets — taking a product from no search presence to top-ranking positions against established incumbents.Deep expertise across on-page, off-page, and technical SEO, with a strong grasp of how search engines crawl, index, and rank content.Hands-on experience with ASO for iOS and/or Android apps, including keyword optimization, listing experiments, and review management.Strong understanding of the generative AI search landscape and emerging GEO best practices.Proficiency with industry tools: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Screaming Frog, and at least one ASO platform (preferably Sensor Tower).Experience working with CMS platforms (e.g., WordPress) and comfort with basic HTML/CSS.Excellent communicator who can present data-driven strategies to senior leadership, including C-level stakeholders.Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or a related field.Bonus PointsExperience at a SaaS, EdTech, or consumer-tech company with a freemium or subscription business model.Hands-on experience with multilingual and multi-regional SEO and ASO strategies.Familiarity with structured data, schema markup, and Knowledge Graph optimization.Experience with programmatic SEO or large-scale page generation strategies.Experience optimizing browser extension listings in the Chrome Web Store or equivalent platforms.Background in conversion rate optimization (CRO) as it relates to organic landing pages and store listings.Comfortable working across time zones in a fully remote, globally distributed team.Why Join QuillBot?Ownership & Impact: Take full ownership of organic growth across every discovery surface and directly influence QuillBot’s trajectory.Scope & Challenge: Lead a function that spans SEO, ASO, GEO, and Extension Stores—a rare opportunity to shape organic strategy holistically.Collaborative Culture: Work with a passionate, innovative team across Content, Marketing, Product, and Engineering.Remote Flexibility: Enjoy the flexibility of working remotely with flexible hours to balance professional and personal life.Professional Growth: QuillBot values learning and development, offering opportunities for skill enhancement and career advancement.Benefits & PerksCompetitive salary and annual bonusMedical coverageLife and accidental insuranceVacation & leaves of absence (menstrual, flexible, special, and more!)Developmental opportunities through education & developmental reimbursements & professional workshopsMaternity & parental leaveHybrid & remote model with flexible working hoursOn-site & remote company events throughout the yearTech & WFH stipends & new hire allowancesEmployee referral programPremium access to QuillBot*Benefits and benefit amounts differ by region. A comprehensive list applicable to your region will be provided in your interview process. Research shows that candidates from underrepresented backgrounds often don't apply for roles if they don't meet all the criteria. We strongly encourage you to apply if you're interested: we'd love to learn how you can amplify our team with your unique experience!This role is eligible for hire in India.We are a virtual-first company and have employees dispersed throughout the United States, Canada, India, Israel, Germany, and the Netherlands. We have a market-based pay structure that varies by location. The base pay for this position is dependent on multiple factors, including candidate experience and expertise, and may vary from the amounts listed. You may also be eligible to participate in our bonus program and may be offered benefits, and other types of compensation.#Learneo Equal ​Employment Opportunity Statement ​(EEO)We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity and ​inclusion within our company.  ​We will consider all qualified applicants without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, gender ​identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, ​veteran status, or ​ability status. We will ensure that individuals who are differently abled are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment as provided to other applicants or employees. Please contact us to request accommodation.
descriptionHtml:
About Learneo
Learneo is a platform of builder-driven businesses, including Course Hero, CliffsNotes, LitCharts, Quillbot, Symbolab, and Scribbr, all united around a shared mission of supercharging productivity and learning for everyone. We attract and scale high growth businesses built and run by visionary entrepreneurs. Each team innovates independently but has a unique opportunity to collaborate, experiment, and grow together, and they are supported by centralized corporate operations functions, including HR, Finance and Legal.

Role Overview
We are looking for a strategic, high-ownership Director of Organic Growth to lead and scale QuillBot’s organic acquisition engine across all major discovery surfaces. This role goes well beyond traditional SEO—you will own the full spectrum of organic growth, including Search Engine Optimization (SEO), App Store Optimization (ASO), Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), and Extension Store visibility (Chrome Web Store, Safari Extensions Gallery, and others). As a Director, you will set the vision, build and manage the roadmap, and lead the existing SEO & Organic Growth team. You’ll partner closely with Product, Engineering, Content, Brand, and International teams to embed organic growth into QuillBot’s product and go-to-market strategy. Your work will directly influence organic traffic, sales, install volume, revenue, and brand visibility on a global scale.

Responsibilities

  • Strategy & Leadership
    • Organic Growth Strategy: Define and own the overarching organic growth strategy spanning SEO, ASO, GEO, and Extension Store optimization. Set quarterly and annual OKRs tied to impressions, clicks, MAU, installs, and sales. 
    • Team Leadership: Manage, mentor, and develop the SEO & Organic Growth team. Foster a culture of experimentation, accountability, and continuous learning. Identify and hire for key capability gaps as needed.
    • Roadmap Ownership: Build and maintain a prioritized organic growth roadmap. Balance quick wins with longer-term strategic bets. Present plans and progress to senior leadership, including the CEO.
    • Cross-Functional Partnership: Serve as the organic growth voice in cross-functional planning with AI, Product, Engineering, Content, Brand, Marketing Operations, and International Expansion teams. Ensure organic considerations are embedded in product launches, site architecture decisions, and content strategy.
    • Product Roadmap Influence: Act as a key influencer of the Product roadmap by surfacing organic growth opportunities, user intent data, and search landscape insights that shape feature prioritization, new product bets, and go-to-market timing.
  • Search Engine Optimization (SEO)
    • SEO Program Ownership: Own end-to-end SEO performance across QuillBot’s web properties. Drive strategy across on-page, off-page, and technical SEO to secure and defend top positions for high-value keywords.
    • Technical SEO: Lead technical audits and partner with Engineering to resolve crawlability, indexation, Core Web Vitals, site speed, structured data, and mobile-responsiveness issues at scale.
    • Content & Keyword Strategy: Oversee keyword research, content gap analysis, and on-page optimization. Collaborate with the Content team to ensure every page is strategically targeted and continuously improved.
    • Link Building & Authority: Direct link-building and digital PR strategies to grow domain authority. Evaluate backlink quality and build partnerships with authoritative sites.
    • Algorithm Resilience: Monitor Google algorithm updates, diagnose ranking fluctuations, and quickly adapt strategies to protect and grow organic traffic.
  • Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO)
    • GEO Strategy: Develop and execute a strategy to maximize QuillBot’s visibility in AI-generated answers and citations across generative search experiences (e.g., Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, etc).
    • Content for LLMs: Work with Content and Product to structure information, schema markup, and authoritative content so that generative engines accurately surface and recommend QuillBot.
    • Measurement & Experimentation: Define GEO-specific metrics, build tracking frameworks, and run experiments to understand how generative surfaces drive traffic and conversions.
    • Competitive Intelligence: Monitor how competitors are cited in generative answers and identify opportunities to increase QuillBot’s share of voice.
  • App Store Optimisation (ASO)
    • ASO Program Ownership: Own QuillBot’s organic discoverability and conversion rates in the Apple App Store and Google Play Store.
    • Listing Optimization: Optimize app titles, subtitles, descriptions, keywords, screenshots, and preview videos to improve search rankings and download conversion rates.
    • Ratings & Reviews: Develop strategies to increase the volume and quality of positive ratings and reviews, and work with Product to address recurring user feedback themes.
    • A/B Testing: Design and run store listing experiments to continuously improve conversion. Leverage tools like Google Play Experiments and third-party ASO platforms.
    • Market-Specific ASO: Partner with the International Expansion team to localize and optimize listings for priority markets.
  • Extension Store Optimisation
    • Extension Visibility: Own QuillBot’s presence and discoverability in the Chrome Web Store, Safari Extensions Gallery, Microsoft Edge Add-ons, and Firefox Add-ons.
    • Listing & CRO: Optimize extension titles, descriptions, screenshots, and feature graphics. Improve install conversion rates through iterative testing.
    • Ratings & Review Strategy: Drive rating volume and quality for extensions. Coordinate with Product and Support to address negative feedback and reduce churn.
    • Cross-Channel Synergy: Align extension store strategy with SEO and ASO efforts to create a unified organic discovery experience across web, app, and extension surfaces.
  • Analytics, Reporting & Insights
    • Performance Measurement: Build and maintain dashboards tracking organic performance across all channels (SEO, ASO, GEO, Extension Stores). Define KPIs and ensure the team is data-driven in decision-making.
    • Executive Reporting: Deliver regular performance updates and strategic insights to senior leadership. Translate complex organic data into clear narratives with actionable recommendations.
    • Tool Stack: Evaluate and manage the organic growth tool stack (e.g., Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Sensor Tower, Screaming Frog, etc).

Qualifications

  • 8–10 years of progressive experience in SEO and/or organic growth, with at least 3 years in a people-management role.
  • Global experience: demonstrated ability to drive organic growth across multiple markets, regions, and languages—not limited to English-speaking audiences.
  • Demonstrated success managing organic growth for a high-traffic website (+20M monthly active users) and a consumer app with significant install volume.
  • Proven track record of securing and defending #1 positions for competitive keywords
  • Proven ability to build organic visibility from zero for new product launches in highly competitive markets — taking a product from no search presence to top-ranking positions against established incumbents.
  • Deep expertise across on-page, off-page, and technical SEO, with a strong grasp of how search engines crawl, index, and rank content.
  • Hands-on experience with ASO for iOS and/or Android apps, including keyword optimization, listing experiments, and review management.
  • Strong understanding of the generative AI search landscape and emerging GEO best practices.
  • Proficiency with industry tools: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Screaming Frog, and at least one ASO platform (preferably Sensor Tower).
  • Experience working with CMS platforms (e.g., WordPress) and comfort with basic HTML/CSS.
  • Excellent communicator who can present data-driven strategies to senior leadership, including C-level stakeholders.
  • Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or a related field.

Bonus Points

  • Experience at a SaaS, EdTech, or consumer-tech company with a freemium or subscription business model.
  • Hands-on experience with multilingual and multi-regional SEO and ASO strategies.
  • Familiarity with structured data, schema markup, and Knowledge Graph optimization.
  • Experience with programmatic SEO or large-scale page generation strategies.
  • Experience optimizing browser extension listings in the Chrome Web Store or equivalent platforms.
  • Background in conversion rate optimization (CRO) as it relates to organic landing pages and store listings.
  • Comfortable working across time zones in a fully remote, globally distributed team.

Why Join QuillBot?

  • Ownership & Impact: Take full ownership of organic growth across every discovery surface and directly influence QuillBot’s trajectory.
  • Scope & Challenge: Lead a function that spans SEO, ASO, GEO, and Extension Stores—a rare opportunity to shape organic strategy holistically.
  • Collaborative Culture: Work with a passionate, innovative team across Content, Marketing, Product, and Engineering.
  • Remote Flexibility: Enjoy the flexibility of working remotely with flexible hours to balance professional and personal life.
  • Professional Growth: QuillBot values learning and development, offering opportunities for skill enhancement and career advancement.

Benefits & Perks

  • Competitive salary and annual bonus
  • Medical coverage
  • Life and accidental insurance
  • Vacation & leaves of absence (menstrual, flexible, special, and more!)
  • Developmental opportunities through education & developmental reimbursements & professional workshops
  • Maternity & parental leave
  • Hybrid & remote model with flexible working hours
  • On-site & remote company events throughout the year
  • Tech & WFH stipends & new hire allowances
  • Employee referral program
  • Premium access to QuillBot

*Benefits and benefit amounts differ by region. A comprehensive list applicable to your region will be provided in your interview process. 

Research shows that candidates from underrepresented backgrounds often don't apply for roles if they don't meet all the criteria. We strongly encourage you to apply if you're interested: we'd love to learn how you can amplify our team with your unique experience!

This role is eligible for hire in India.

We are a virtual-first company and have employees dispersed throughout the United States, Canada, India, Israel, Germany, and the Netherlands. We have a market-based pay structure that varies by location. The base pay for this position is dependent on multiple factors, including candidate experience and expertise, and may vary from the amounts listed. You may also be eligible to participate in our bonus program and may be offered benefits, and other types of compensation.

#Learneo

Equal ​Employment Opportunity Statement ​(EEO)

We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity and ​inclusion within our company.  ​We will consider all qualified applicants without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, gender ​identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, ​veteran status, or ​ability status. We will ensure that individuals who are differently abled are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment as provided to other applicants or employees. Please contact us to request accommodation.

descriptionHtml:
Head of Product - AIVM (Agentic AI & Blockchain Platform)

Location: Remote (Global)

Position: Head of Product

Company: AIVM

Position Type: Full-Time

About AIVM

AIVM is building the guardrails for the post-human agentic economy, integrating cutting-edge AI and Blockchain technology. Our toolkit will enable standardized agentic payments, identity, and accountability, providing a key piece of infrastructure for the coming 1 billion AI agents. AIVM is part of the ChainGPT ecosystem, a pioneer in the decentralized AI field.

About The Role

We are looking for a highly technical and execution-driven Head of Product to lead one of the most ambitious initiatives in Web3: the AIVM (Artificial Intelligence Virtual Machine).

Reporting to the CEO, you will translate AIVM's company vision into product architecture, roadmap, developer experience, and launch execution, including:

  • The Policy Oracle: Cryptographic guardrails that intercept, evaluate, and enforce agent action before execution
  • Agent Identity and Reputation: including emerging standards such as ERC-8004
  • Programmable Payments and Wallet Abstraction: including x402-inspired flows
  • Immutable Accountability: via execution receipts that make agent actions traceable and auditable

We are currently in a high-velocity, pre-mainnet phase.

This is not a conventional SaaS feature-shipping role. You will define primitives, product architecture, developer experience, and ecosystem adoption from pre-mainnet to launch.

Responsibilities

The immediate priority is to inherit the current roadmap, pressure-test the core primitives, align engineering and go-to-market, and drive the platform toward testnet/mainnet readiness.

Product Vision & Platform Strategy

  • Inherit and evolve the existing product vision, roadmap, and platform strategy for the AIVM ecosystem
  • Position AIVM as a category-defining decentralized AI infrastructure layer
  • Translate complex technical capabilities into clear product strategy and market positioning

Platform & Ecosystem Design

  • Lead the design of AIVM as a multi-sided platform serving:
    • Agent developers and AI application teams
    • Protocols and apps integrating autonomous agents
    • Enterprises needing policy, compliance, and controlled execution
    • Node operators / validators / infrastructure providers
    • Data, compute, and model providers
  • Define core primitives: APIs, SDKs, execution layers, and developer experience
Execution & Product Leadership

  • Build and lead a high-performance product function
  • Drive end-to-end product execution from concept to Mainnet and beyond
  • Establish product processes that balance speed, quality, and scalability
  • Partner deeply with engineering to align on architecture, trade-offs, and delivery
  • Run product and technical execution rituals to maintain roadmap clarity, accountability, and delivery momentum

Cross-Functional Alignment

  • Act as the central bridge between product, engineering, marketing, and business development
  • Collaborate on go-to-market strategy, product launches, and narrative
  • Support partnerships with strong product thinking and technical clarity

Data, Metrics & Optimization

  • Define and track core product and ecosystem KPIs:
    • Developer adoption
    • Agent deployments
    • Network activity and retention
  • Use insights to continuously refine product direction and priorities

Requirements

Must have:

  • 7+ years of experience in Product Management, including 2-3+ years in leadership roles
  • Technical experience is mandatory for this role. The candidate must be able to communicate effectively with our Tech Team and discuss in technical language
  • Optional(but really important to have):
  • Solid understanding of AI/ML infrastructure (inference, training, compute economics)
  • Experience building platforms, infrastructure products, or developer-facing systems
  • Strong background in blockchain/Web3, ideally L1, L2, or AI ecosystems
  • Proven ability to define and execute product strategy in complex, emerging markets

Strong Plus:

  • Experience working in remote, fast-paced, high-ownership environments
  • Utilizing AI Agents infrastructures for optimization (Claude/OpenClaw)
  • Strong communication and leadership skills with the ability to align technical and non-technical stakeholders
  • Comfortable operating before product-market fit, where the job is to reduce ambiguity, define primitives, and force trade-offs

Benefits

Company Culture and Values

At AIVM, we value trust, effective speed, innovation, and growth. You will be expected to operate with high ownership, clear communication, and strong execution discipline in a fast-moving, pre-mainnet environment.

Benefits & Additional Information

What We Offer

  • Work on one of the most ambitious AI x Blockchain infrastructure products in the market
  • Remote-first setup with flexible hours, focused on outcomes, trust, and ownership
  • Competitive compensation, with performance-based upside where applicable
  • Fast-moving environment with direct access to leadership and zero micromanagement
  • The tools, autonomy, and support needed to build at scale

Additional Information:

  • Employment Compliance and Confidentiality:
  • All employees will be onboarded through our official payroll and HR provider, which manages employment documentation, tax withholdings, and compliance with legal requirements based on the employee's country of residence. As part of the onboarding process, each new hire is required to complete a Know Your Customer (KYC) verification, sign a Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA), execute an employment contract, and fulfill any additional legal requirements specific to you jurisdiction. This process ensures compliance, protects company information, and establishes a secure and professional employment relationship
  • Employment Structure:
  • The position is offered on either an employee or contractor basis, depending on the location and role. Individuals will receive payment via direct deposit on a monthly basis. Additional details regarding compensation, benefits, and company policies will be provided during onboarding and outlined in the official employment agreement
  • Compensation:
  • Salaries are paid in fiat currency via direct deposit on a monthly schedule, with payments issued on the first business day of each month. This structure ensures timely and transparent compensation aligned with local financial systems
  • Probationary Period:
  • All new employees will undergo a 90-day probationary period, which serves as a mutual evaluation phase. During this time, both the employee and ChainGPT can assess fit, performance, and long-term alignment with the role and company

descriptionHtml:
Who we are…?


About REA India Pte. Ltd.:

REA India is a subsidiary of REA Group Ltd. (ASX: REA), a leading digital real estate business headquartered in Melbourne, Australia, and part of the NewsCorp family.


REA India owns Housing.com, the country’s leading real estate technology platform. With a vision to change the way India experiences property, the platform helps consumers throughout their buying, renting, and selling journey. It also offers a robust suite of Self services—such as smart listing tools, digital assistance—empowering home seekers and owners to manage their property needs with ease and online rent payment. These offerings enhance convenience, improve listing visibility, and enable direct engagement for both property owners and seekers.

For businesses, Housing.com offers advertising and listing products for developers and agents, as well as exclusive sales and marketing solutions. It also offers Housing Studio, a suite of innovative AR&VR content to drive better engagement.


REA India operates with a team of 1100+ professionals across 30+ offices nationwide, with its corporate headquarters in Gurugram, Haryana.



Our Culture

Culture forms the core of our foundation and our effort towards creating an engaging workplace that has resulted in REA India being ranked 5th among the coveted list of India’s Best 100 Companies to Work For in 2024 by the Great Place to Work Institute®. REA India was also ranked among Top 5 workplaces list in 2023, the Top 25 workplaces list in 2022 and 2021, and the Top 50 workplaces list in 2019. In addition, REA India was also recognized as Best Workplace™ in Building a Culture of Innovation by All in 2025, 2024 & 2023 and India’s Best Workplaces™ in Retail (e-commerce category) for the fifth time in 2025.


REA India once again made it to the Top 15 Best Workplaces in Asia for 2024, marking its second consecutive appearance, after ranking 4th in 2023, 55th in 2022, and 48th in 2021. Additionally, REA India has been recognized twice in a row among the Top 50 Best Workplaces™ for Women in India (2024, 2023, and 2021) and earned a spot among India’s Top 10 Best Workplaces for Millennials List for the second consecutive year by Great Place to Work®.


At REA India, we believe in creating a home for our people, where they feel a sense of belonging and purpose. By fostering a culture of inclusion and continuous learning and growth, every team member has the opportunity to thrive, embrace the spirit of being part of a global family, while contributing to revolutionize the way India experiences property. When you come to REA India, you truly COME HOME!


REA India (Housing.com) is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes all qualified individuals to apply for employment. We are committed to creating an environment that is free from discrimination, harassment, and any other form of unlawful behavior. We value diversity and inclusion and do not discriminate against our people or applicants for employment based on age, color, gender, marital status, caste, religion, race, ethnic group, nationality, religious or political conviction, sexual orientation, gender identity, pregnancy, family responsibility, or disability or any other legally protected status. We firmly strive to eliminate any barriers that may impede equal opportunities while also recognizing that specific job roles may require appointees to possess the necessary qualifications, skills, abilities to perform essential functions of the position effectively.



About the role

As the Associate Director of Product – CAIP (Content, AI and Platform), you will own the product vision and strategy across three of REA India’s most critical charters: Content, Artificial Intelligence, and our emerging Platform capabilities.


You will lead teams to reshape the user experience by building intelligence into our products, leveraging cutting-edge technologies such as GenAI, Agentic AI , strengthening content ecosystems that drive trust and discovery, and building platform foundations that enable REA India to scale exponentially.


This is a senior leadership role that requires strategic breadth, technical depth, and the ability to align diverse teams around a unified product vision, further strengthening REA India’s position as India’s leading real estate technology platform. The role reports to the Chief Product Officer and is a member of the Product & Design Leadership Team.



What does this role hold for you…?


Content Product Strategy

  • Define and drive the content product roadmap, ensuring REA India delivers high-quality, trustworthy, and data-enriched property content across Housing.com
  • Build innovative, flexible and scalable solutions leveraging GenAI and Agentic capabilities
  • Lead strategies for content creation, curation, and enrichment at scale — spanning locality data, property listings, imagery, and market insights
  • Partner with editorial, data, and engineering teams to build content systems that enhance SEO performance, strengthen consumer trust, and enable better decision-making
  • Establish quality frameworks and governance standards to ensure content consistency and accuracy across all platforms and consumer touchpoints


AI Product Strategy and Development

  • Develop and articulate a comprehensive AI product vision and roadmap aligned with REA India’s business objectives and technological priorities
  • Lead cross-functional teams to design, implement, and optimize AI driven solutions innovations targeted at improving our market facing experience and operational efficiency across all REA India platforms


Platform Product Strategy

  • Own the platform product strategy, defining foundational capabilities — APIs, data pipelines, developer tools, and shared services — that enable rapid and reliable product development across REA India
  • Drive a platform-as-a-product mindset, by partnering closely with engineering and architecture teams to prioritise platform investments that unlock maximum leverage for market-facing teams
  • Build alignment on platform governance, access models, and adoption standards across product and engineering teams
  • Cross-Domain Leadership and Stakeholder Engagement
  • Articulate and communicate REA India’s CAIP strategy,bringing clarity and vision across industry forums, conferences, seminars, and executive panels
  • Collaborate with senior leadership to influence strategic design and execution on content, Ai, and platform initiatives, ensuring alignment with market trends and competitive dynamics
  • Foster partnerships with external technologists, data providers, and thought leaders to continuously refine and strengthen product strategy across all three domains
  • Lead, mentor, and grow high-performing product teams across Content, Ai and Platform , fostering a culture of rigour, curiosity and impact



Apply if you have…

  • 8+ years of experience in product management, with at least 4 years in senior leadership roles within technology-driven organizations
  • Demonstrated experience leading product strategy across multiple domains — ideally spanning content systems, AI /ML products, and platform or infrastructure-led products
  • A proven track record in strategising, launching, and scaling enterprise-level AI initiatives that drive business impact, growth and transform user experiences
  • Deep expertise in AI technologies and machine learning models, including neural networks, natural language processing, and predictive analytics
  • Strong understanding of content management, data quality, and content enrichment strategies in a consumer internet context
  • Experience owning or contributing to platform strategy, API products, or shared capability development
  • Proficiency in leading complex, cross-functional projects in agile environments with a collaborative and outcome-driven approach



Desired Attributes:

  • Strong strategic and analytical thinking , with the ability to synthesise across content, AI and platform to deliver a clear and compelling product vision
  • Exceptional leadership and mentorship skills to inspire and build high-performing, multi-disciplinary teams
  • Ability to operate seamlessly across strategic and execution levels — equally comfortable defining a three-year vision and diving into product and delivery detail when required
  • Passionate for continuous learning and staying ahead of emerging trend in AI technologies, content innovation, and platform engineering
  • Outstanding communication skills with the ability to articulate complex, multi-domain product strategies effectively to diverse stakeholders, including technical teams, executive leadership, and external partners



Know more about us…

Visit our career website at https://careers.housing.com/ and LinkedIn page to know more about our company culture, and gain insights into what makes us a Great Place to Work.

Want to dive into what we do? Visit our main website for an in-depth look at www.housing.com

title: Senior Director: Product Management Practice
description: DirectorJob Title: Head of Product Management PracticeLocation: IndiaRole OverviewWe are seeking a visionary and highly strategic Head of Product Management Practice to lead, scale, and mature our Product Management consulting offering. In this pivotal leadership role, you will be the driving force behind our practice’s growth, acting as a bridge between business development, internal business units, and our talented consultants. You will define the strategic roadmap for the practice, drive revenue through client partnerships, optimize resource deployment, and cultivate a world-class environment for Product Owner and Product Manager career development.
descriptionHtml:
Director

Job Title: Head of Product Management Practice

Location: India

Role Overview

We are seeking a visionary and highly strategic Head of Product Management Practice to lead, scale, and mature our Product Management consulting offering. In this pivotal leadership role, you will be the driving force behind our practice’s growth, acting as a bridge between business development, internal business units, and our talented consultants. You will define the strategic roadmap for the practice, drive revenue through client partnerships, optimize resource deployment, and cultivate a world-class environment for Product Owner and Product Manager career development.

title: Director, Customer Outcomes GTM
description: Company DescriptionIt all started in sunny San Diego, California in 2004 when a visionary engineer, Fred Luddy, saw the potential to transform how we work. Fast forward to today — ServiceNow stands as a global market leader, bringing innovative AI-enhanced technology to over 8,100 customers, including 85% of the Fortune 500®. Our intelligent cloud-based platform seamlessly connects people, systems, and processes to empower organizations to find smarter, faster, and better ways to work. But this is just the beginning of our journey. Join us as we pursue our purpose to make the world work better for everyone.Job DescriptionJob DescriptionRole OverviewWe’re in growth mode across the INDIA region—and looking for a seasoned, strategic, and high-impact Services Sales Leader to drive our Professional and Strategic Services business. This role comes with a clear booking revenue and margin target and will be a key force behind expanding ServiceNow’s footprint through business transformational, value-led services engagements all configured on the ServiceNow AI Platform.You will not only lead a high-performing team but also serve as a strategic pillar of our Customer Excellence Group (CEG) organisation—working across functions to influence customer adoption, retention, and value realization. This role is central to our mission: to make ServiceNow the best buying decision our customers have ever made.This role isn’t just about growth—it's about AI and Business transformation. You’ll be responsible for driving large, complex, and transformational service-led deals with some of the most strategic customers across the region, while also coaching and developing your team to build those same capabilities.What You’ll DoOwn the INDIA sales strategy for Services (Professional services and Customer Success), aligning with all Field Sales, Partners, and Marketing to deliver a seamless “land‑and‑expand” motionDevelop and close business and technology lead transformational, end to end services deals that elevate the customer relationship and accelerate business value realizationCoach and mentor your team to identify, shape, scoping and close complex service engagements, building long-term capability across the regionOwn and deliver against a defined Services booking, revenue and margin target across INDIADrive consistent forecasting, pipeline growth, and operational discipline to support predictable bookings, margin and revenue and well as qualify opportunities and scoping.Recruit, develop, and lead a high-performing GTM team with a focus on coaching, development, and quota & participation performancePartner with field teams on opportunity qualification, pipeline health, territory planning, and account strategiesBuild deep, trusted relationships with customer C‑suite and internal stakeholders across functionsCollaborate closely with descriptionHtml:
Company Description

It all started in sunny San Diego, California in 2004 when a visionary engineer, Fred Luddy, saw the potential to transform how we work. Fast forward to today — ServiceNow stands as a global market leader, bringing innovative AI-enhanced technology to over 8,100 customers, including 85% of the Fortune 500®. Our intelligent cloud-based platform seamlessly connects people, systems, and processes to empower organizations to find smarter, faster, and better ways to work. But this is just the beginning of our journey. Join us as we pursue our purpose to make the world work better for everyone.

Job Description

Job Description

Role Overview

We’re in growth mode across the INDIA region—and looking for a seasoned, strategic, and high-impact Services Sales Leader to drive our Professional and Strategic Services business. This role comes with a clear booking revenue and margin target and will be a key force behind expanding ServiceNow’s footprint through business transformational, value-led services engagements all configured on the ServiceNow AI Platform.

You will not only lead a high-performing team but also serve as a strategic pillar of our Customer Excellence Group (CEG) organisation—working across functions to influence customer adoption, retention, and value realization. This role is central to our mission: to make ServiceNow the best buying decision our customers have ever made.

This role isn’t just about growth—it's about AI and Business transformation. You’ll be responsible for driving large, complex, and transformational service-led deals with some of the most strategic customers across the region, while also coaching and developing your team to build those same capabilities.

What You’ll Do

  • Own the INDIA sales strategy for Services (Professional services and Customer Success), aligning with all Field Sales, Partners, and Marketing to deliver a seamless “land‑and‑expand” motion
  • Develop and close business and technology lead transformational, end to end services deals that elevate the customer relationship and accelerate business value realization
  • Coach and mentor your team to identify, shape, scoping and close complex service engagements, building long-term capability across the region
  • Own and deliver against a defined Services booking, revenue and margin target across INDIA
  • Drive consistent forecasting, pipeline growth, and operational discipline to support predictable bookings, margin and revenue and well as qualify opportunities and scoping.
  • Recruit, develop, and lead a high-performing GTM team with a focus on coaching, development, and quota & participation performance
  • Partner with field teams on opportunity qualification, pipeline health, territory planning, and account strategies
  • Build deep, trusted relationships with customer C‑suite and internal stakeholders across functions
  • Collaborate closely with Services Sales Pre-Sales, Services Delivery, Product Management, Customer Success, and Field Sales

What Success Looks Like

  • Exceeded Services-led bookings, revenue and margin targets across INDIA
  • Closed high-value transformational deals that materially impact customer strategy and platform adoption
  • Develop a high-performing Services Sales team with repeatable plays for value-based selling
  • Aligned regional efforts to CEG’s broader KPIs, influencing outcomes well beyond services sales, such as NPS, Attrition and Net New Licenses Sales
  • Strengthened cross-functional relationships across Field, Services Delivery, and Customer Success

Why You’ll Love This

  • Be at the forefront of one of ServiceNow’s fastest-growing markets in APAC — India
  • Play a key role in delivering on ServiceNow’s Customer Excellence Group (CEG) strategy
  • Lead the Services motion that directly enables customer value and company growth
  • Be part of the incredible CEG India leadership team
  • Competitive compensation package including bonus, stock, and benefits
  • Join a fast-moving, inclusive, and high-performance culture focused on customer success
  • A rare opportunity to build transformational customer journeys that shape the future of work

Qualifications

Qualifications

What You Bring

  • 15+ years of enterprise software/services sales leadership in SaaS, consulting, or digital transformation
  • Demonstrable experience selling or consulting with ServiceNow products
  • Proven experience selling in India, with a good understanding of local buying processes, regulations, culture, and how decisions are made. Having strong connections with large Indian companies is a plus.
  • Proven ability to influence outcomes across customer success, consulting, and sales functions
  • Deep experience selling into CxO stakeholders with strong business case and value articulation
  • A leadership style built around coaching, mentoring, and team development
  • Create territory-specific go-to-market plans addressing varying levels of technology readiness, language, buying behaviour, and cultural expectations across markets like Asia, India, and ANZ
  • Strong understanding of ServiceNow solutions (ITSM, ITOM, HRSD, CSM, etc.) and services GTM motion
  • Exceptional collaboration skills—cross-functional by nature, driven by partnership and impact
  • Strong business acumen with forecasting, territory planning, and strategic thinking skills
  • Fluent in English

Additional Information

Work Personas

We approach our distributed world of work with flexibility and trust. Work personas (flexible, remote, or required in office) are categories that are assigned to ServiceNow employees depending on the nature of their work and their assigned work location. Learn more here. To determine eligibility for a work persona, ServiceNow may confirm the distance between your primary residence and the closest ServiceNow office using a third-party service.

Equal Opportunity Employer

ServiceNow is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, creed, religion, sex, sexual orientation, national origin or nationality, ancestry, age, disability, gender identity or expression, marital status, veteran status, or any other category protected by law. In addition, all qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records will be considered for employment in accordance with legal requirements.

Accommodations

We strive to create an accessible and inclusive experience for all candidates. If you require a reasonable accommodation to complete any part of the application process, or are unable to use this online application and need an alternative method to apply, please contact globaltalentss@servicenow.com for assistance.

Export Control Regulations

For positions requiring access to controlled technology subject to export control regulations, including the U.S. Export Administration Regulations (EAR), ServiceNow may be required to obtain export control approval from government authorities for certain individuals. All employment is contingent upon ServiceNow obtaining any export license or other approval that may be required by relevant export control authorities.

From Fortune. ©2025 Fortune Media IP Limited. All rights reserved. Used under license.

title: Director of Organic Growth
description: About LearneoLearneo is a platform of builder-driven businesses, including Course Hero, CliffsNotes, LitCharts, Quillbot, Symbolab, and Scribbr, all united around a shared mission of supercharging productivity and learning for everyone. We attract and scale high growth businesses built and run by visionary entrepreneurs. Each team innovates independently but has a unique opportunity to collaborate, experiment, and grow together, and they are supported by centralized corporate operations functions, including HR, Finance and Legal. Role OverviewWe are looking for a strategic, high-ownership Director of Organic Growth to lead and scale QuillBot’s organic acquisition engine across all major discovery surfaces. This role goes well beyond traditional SEO—you will own the full spectrum of organic growth, including Search Engine Optimization (SEO), App Store Optimization (ASO), Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), and Extension Store visibility (Chrome Web Store, Safari Extensions Gallery, and others). As a Director, you will set the vision, build and manage the roadmap, and lead the existing SEO & Organic Growth team. You’ll partner closely with Product, Engineering, Content, Brand, and International teams to embed organic growth into QuillBot’s product and go-to-market strategy. Your work will directly influence organic traffic, sales, install volume, revenue, and brand visibility on a global scale.ResponsibilitiesStrategy & LeadershipOrganic Growth Strategy: Define and own the overarching organic growth strategy spanning SEO, ASO, GEO, and Extension Store optimization. Set quarterly and annual OKRs tied to impressions, clicks, MAU, installs, and sales. Team Leadership: Manage, mentor, and develop the SEO & Organic Growth team. Foster a culture of experimentation, accountability, and continuous learning. Identify and hire for key capability gaps as needed.Roadmap Ownership: Build and maintain a prioritized organic growth roadmap. Balance quick wins with longer-term strategic bets. Present plans and progress to senior leadership, including the CEO.Cross-Functional Partnership: Serve as the organic growth voice in cross-functional planning with AI, Product, Engineering, Content, Brand, Marketing Operations, and International Expansion teams. Ensure organic considerations are embedded in product launches, site architecture decisions, and content strategy.Product Roadmap Influence: Act as a key influencer of the Product roadmap by surfacing organic growth opportunities, user intent data, and search landscape insights that shape feature prioritization, new product bets, and go-to-market timing.Search Engine Optimization (SEO)SEO Program Ownership: Own end-to-end SEO performance across QuillBot’s web properties. Drive strategy across on-page, off-page, and technical SEO to secure and defend top positions for high-value keywords.Technical SEO: Lead technical audits and partner with Engineering to resolve crawlability, indexation, Core Web Vitals, site speed, structured data, and mobile-responsiveness issues at scale.Content & Keyword Strategy: Oversee keyword research, content gap analysis, and on-page optimization. Collaborate with the Content team to ensure every page is strategically targeted and continuously improved.Link Building & Authority: Direct link-building and digital PR strategies to grow domain authority. Evaluate backlink quality and build partnerships with authoritative sites.Algorithm Resilience: Monitor Google algorithm updates, diagnose ranking fluctuations, and quickly adapt strategies to protect and grow organic traffic.Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO)GEO Strategy: Develop and execute a strategy to maximize QuillBot’s visibility in AI-generated answers and citations across generative search experiences (e.g., Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, etc).Content for LLMs: Work with Content and Product to structure information, schema markup, and authoritative content so that generative engines accurately surface and recommend QuillBot.Measurement & Experimentation: Define GEO-specific metrics, build tracking frameworks, and run experiments to understand how generative surfaces drive traffic and conversions.Competitive Intelligence: Monitor how competitors are cited in generative answers and identify opportunities to increase QuillBot’s share of voice.App Store Optimisation (ASO)ASO Program Ownership: Own QuillBot’s organic discoverability and conversion rates in the Apple App Store and Google Play Store.Listing Optimization: Optimize app titles, subtitles, descriptions, keywords, screenshots, and preview videos to improve search rankings and download conversion rates.Ratings & Reviews: Develop strategies to increase the volume and quality of positive ratings and reviews, and work with Product to address recurring user feedback themes.A/B Testing: Design and run store listing experiments to continuously improve conversion. Leverage tools like Google Play Experiments and third-party ASO platforms.Market-Specific ASO: Partner with the International Expansion team to localize and optimize listings for priority markets.Extension Store OptimisationExtension Visibility: Own QuillBot’s presence and discoverability in the Chrome Web Store, Safari Extensions Gallery, Microsoft Edge Add-ons, and Firefox Add-ons.Listing & CRO: Optimize extension titles, descriptions, screenshots, and feature graphics. Improve install conversion rates through iterative testing.Ratings & Review Strategy: Drive rating volume and quality for extensions. Coordinate with Product and Support to address negative feedback and reduce churn.Cross-Channel Synergy: Align extension store strategy with SEO and ASO efforts to create a unified organic discovery experience across web, app, and extension surfaces.Analytics, Reporting & InsightsPerformance Measurement: Build and maintain dashboards tracking organic performance across all channels (SEO, ASO, GEO, Extension Stores). Define KPIs and ensure the team is data-driven in decision-making.Executive Reporting: Deliver regular performance updates and strategic insights to senior leadership. Translate complex organic data into clear narratives with actionable recommendations.Tool Stack: Evaluate and manage the organic growth tool stack (e.g., Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Sensor Tower, Screaming Frog, etc).Qualifications8–10 years of progressive experience in SEO and/or organic growth, with at least 3 years in a people-management role.Global experience: demonstrated ability to drive organic growth across multiple markets, regions, and languages—not limited to English-speaking audiences.Demonstrated success managing organic growth for a high-traffic website (+20M monthly active users) and a consumer app with significant install volume.Proven track record of securing and defending #1 positions for competitive keywordsProven ability to build organic visibility from zero for new product launches in highly competitive markets — taking a product from no search presence to top-ranking positions against established incumbents.Deep expertise across on-page, off-page, and technical SEO, with a strong grasp of how search engines crawl, index, and rank content.Hands-on experience with ASO for iOS and/or Android apps, including keyword optimization, listing experiments, and review management.Strong understanding of the generative AI search landscape and emerging GEO best practices.Proficiency with industry tools: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Screaming Frog, and at least one ASO platform (preferably Sensor Tower).Experience working with CMS platforms (e.g., WordPress) and comfort with basic HTML/CSS.Excellent communicator who can present data-driven strategies to senior leadership, including C-level stakeholders.Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or a related field.Bonus PointsExperience at a SaaS, EdTech, or consumer-tech company with a freemium or subscription business model.Hands-on experience with multilingual and multi-regional SEO and ASO strategies.Familiarity with structured data, schema markup, and Knowledge Graph optimization.Experience with programmatic SEO or large-scale page generation strategies.Experience optimizing browser extension listings in the Chrome Web Store or equivalent platforms.Background in conversion rate optimization (CRO) as it relates to organic landing pages and store listings.Comfortable working across time zones in a fully remote, globally distributed team.Why Join QuillBot?Ownership & Impact: Take full ownership of organic growth across every discovery surface and directly influence QuillBot’s trajectory.Scope & Challenge: Lead a function that spans SEO, ASO, GEO, and Extension Stores—a rare opportunity to shape organic strategy holistically.Collaborative Culture: Work with a passionate, innovative team across Content, Marketing, Product, and Engineering.Remote Flexibility: Enjoy the flexibility of working remotely with flexible hours to balance professional and personal life.Professional Growth: QuillBot values learning and development, offering opportunities for skill enhancement and career advancement.Benefits & PerksCompetitive salary and annual bonusMedical coverageLife and accidental insuranceVacation & leaves of absence (menstrual, flexible, special, and more!)Developmental opportunities through education & developmental reimbursements & professional workshopsMaternity & parental leaveHybrid & remote model with flexible working hoursOn-site & remote company events throughout the yearTech & WFH stipends & new hire allowancesEmployee referral programPremium access to QuillBot*Benefits and benefit amounts differ by region. A comprehensive list applicable to your region will be provided in your interview process. Research shows that candidates from underrepresented backgrounds often don't apply for roles if they don't meet all the criteria. We strongly encourage you to apply if you're interested: we'd love to learn how you can amplify our team with your unique experience!This role is eligible for hire in India.We are a virtual-first company and have employees dispersed throughout the United States, Canada, India, Israel, Germany, and the Netherlands. We have a market-based pay structure that varies by location. The base pay for this position is dependent on multiple factors, including candidate experience and expertise, and may vary from the amounts listed. You may also be eligible to participate in our bonus program and may be offered benefits, and other types of compensation.#Learneo Equal ​Employment Opportunity Statement ​(EEO)We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity and ​inclusion within our company.  ​We will consider all qualified applicants without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, gender ​identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, ​veteran status, or ​ability status. We will ensure that individuals who are differently abled are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment as provided to other applicants or employees.
